name: .NET 10.0.0
body:
[Release](https://github.com/dotnet/core/releases/tag/v10.0.0)

## What's Changed
* [release/10.0] Fix DefaultIfEmptyIterator.TryGetElementAt returning default value for out-of-bounds indices by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/119845
* [release/10.0] Add DateOnly and TimeOnly serializer primitives with restrictions by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/119915
* [release/10.0] Ignore re-typed lcl in optAssertionPropLocal_RelOp by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/119813
* [release/10.0] [NativeAOT] Fix resetting apartment state by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/119993
* [release/10.0] Fix race condition when createdump tries to read /proc/pid/mem before prctl(PR_SET_PTRACER, childpid) is set by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120071
* [release/10.0] `UnsafeAccessor` - ambiguous name and signature match by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/119974
* [release/10.0] Revert unhandled exception logic to prevent multiple calls. by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120103
* [release/10.0] Add test for issue #114813 by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120088
* [release/10.0] Add test coverage for issue #99193 by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120089
* [release/10.0] Fix RoundTrip_Export_Import_SPKI and fix typos for SPKI by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120102
* [release/10.0] Update Composite ML-DSA to draft 8 by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120117
* [release/10.0] [PERF] Remove hybrid globalization from iOS perf scenarios by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120123
* [release/10.0] Test for unloadable ALC frees file lock by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120122
* [release/10.0] Don't set security descriptor if the mutex is not owned/new by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120115
* [release/10.0] Fix ResourceUpdater.Dispose() by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120136
* [release/10.0] Properly enumerate uninstrumented bounds when stackwalking in minidump w/o heap by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120073
* [release/10.0] Source code updates from dotnet/dotnet by @dotnet-maestro[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120082
* [release/10.0] Update dependencies from dotnet/xharness by @dotnet-maestro[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120186
* [release/10.0] Load Standalone GC correctly in component scenarios. by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120235
* [release/10.0] Remove an STJ deep nested object test causing occasional failures by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120264
* [release/10.0] Update dependencies from dotnet/hotreload-utils by @dotnet-maestro[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120299
* [release/10.0] Source code updates from dotnet/dotnet by @dotnet-maestro[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120286
* [release/10.0] include memory required to do MethodDefLookup in minidumps by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120148
* [release/10.0] Detect if RSA-384 is supported on the platform by @vcsjones in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120381
* [release/10.0] [mono][hotreload] Make the runtime ignore an update if it is an empty one. by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120334
* [release/10.0] Bump OSX.12 helix queues to OSX.13 by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/119989
* [release/10.0] Revert "Use a ReaderWriterLockSlim in RcwCache" by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120372
* [release/10.0] Fix CopyOSContext on amd64 by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120329
* [release/10.0] Move coreclr EH second pass to native code by @janvorli in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120263
* [release/10.0] Add proper locking in TranslateSigHelper by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120158
* [release/10.0] JIT: Fix heap allocations by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120323
* [release/10.0] Localize WiX files by @PranavSenthilnathan in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120385
* [release/10.0] Limit the use of a pointer to the lexical scope of the target by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120387
* [release/10.0] Update dependencies from dnceng/internal/dotnet-optimization by @dotnet-maestro[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120426
* [release/10.0] Update dependencies from dotnet/icu by @dotnet-maestro[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120350
* [release/10.0] [mono][aot] Increase the max symbol size by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120295
* [release/10.0-rc2] Source code updates from dotnet/dotnet by @dotnet-maestro[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120126
* [release/10.0] Revert conditionally setting SYSTEM PATH in host install (#118092) by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120567
* [release/10.0] [browser] Expect fingerprint on assemblies promoted from build by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120548
* [release/10.0] JIT: Skip bitcast transformation for promoted locals by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120464
* [release/10.0] Fix race on DomainAssembly/Assembly/Module creation that results in incorrectly triggered ICorProfiler callbacks by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120515
* [release/10.0] Avoid referencing types of JsonIgnore'd properties. by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120569
* [release/10.0] Fix issue with array interface devirtualization by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120371
* [release/10.0] Add MetadataUpdateDeletedAttribute and Reflection Filtering by @jeffhandley in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120572
* [release/10.0] Fix ARM64 ThreadAbort issue by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120579
* [release/10.0] Set PRERELEASE to 0 by @jkotas in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120693
* [release/10.0] Fix localization of links in runtime bundle by @PranavSenthilnathan in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120721
* Merge release/10.0-rc2 into release/10.0 by @akoeplinger in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120743
* [release/10.0] Update dependencies from dotnet/xharness by @dotnet-maestro[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120655
* [release/10.0] Source code updates from dotnet/dotnet by @dotnet-maestro[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120521
* [release/10.0] [browser] Expect fingerprint on dotnet.js for preloading by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120746
* [release/10.0] Fix Tensor.Reshape with wildcard by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120806
* [release/10.0] Fix balancing groups incorrectly removed from negative lookarounds by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120888
* [release/10.0] Mark labels in x64 write barrier code as local/alt_entry by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/120923


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/compare/v10.0.0-rc.2.25502.107...v10.0.0

name: .NET 10.0 RC 2
body:
[Release](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/releases/tag/v10.0.0-rc.2.25502.107)

## What's Changed
* [release/10.0] Disable release assert on disallowed thread re-initialization for managed C++ by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/118964
* [release/10.0][Android] Avoid calling membarrier on older Android versions by @simonrozsival in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/119054
* [release/10.0] [Android] Normalize RSA no-padding output to modulus size to fix VerifyHash by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/118950
* [release/10.0] [mono][aot] Fix minor gsharedvt leaks by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/119057
* [release/10.0] [browser][ws] fix race condition during message and close events by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/119085
* [release/10.0] Fix deadlock when creating threads from ModuleInitializer in a shared library by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/119082
* [release/10.0] Fixup some Vector<T> function lookups to use the right name/type by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/119080
* [release/10.0] Avoid marking types as reflected on in CreateSpan by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/118908
* [release/10.0] Add cast to ComAwareWeakReference rehydrate path by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/119141
* [release/10.0] [NativeAOT] Fix floating pointer register unwinding on Arm32 by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/119150
* [release/10.0] JIT: Use native sized indices in the backend for GetElement and WithElement by @jakobbotsch in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/119172
* [release/10.0] Clear TS_GCSuspendRedirected at the end of thread redirection by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/119168
* [release/10.0] JIT: Consistently DNER promoted parameters on arm32 by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/119055
* [automated] Merge branch 'release/10.0-rc1' => 'release/10.0' by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/118890
* [release/10.0] [NativeAOT] Adjust SSP to match RSP of the throw site by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/119194
* [release/10.0] JIT: Disallow widening tailcalls in async functions by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/119175
* [release/10.0] Implement UnhandledException hook for finalizer scenario in Mono. by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/118878
* [release/10.0] Throttle finalization a bit when doing GC stress. by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/119044
* [release/10.0] Fix elfreader for android by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/119191
* [release/10.0] Add trim analyzer support for C# 14 extensions by @sbomer in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/119195
* [release/10.0] Source code updates from dotnet/dotnet by @dotnet-maestro[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/119242
* [release/10.0] [maccatalyst] Check for -Wno-overriding-option for compatibility with clang in Xcode 16.3+ by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/119261
* [release/10.0] Fixes trying to create a module using a trash as the address of the module by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/119063
* [release/10.0] limit regions_range to 2x physical_mem for WKS by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/119192
* [release/10.0] [browser] Append uniqueness to webcil temp path & move instead of copy by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/119258
* [release/10.0] Removes IEquatable constraint from ThrowIfEqual/NotEqual by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/119252
* [release/10.0] Improve compat for low rights users loading CAPI machine keys via PFX by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/119185
* [release/10.0] JIT: fix crash in LSRA seen on VMR build on AVX-512 machines by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/119270
* [release/10.0] [Preserve Lock ID Members by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/119283
* [release/10.0] [wasm] Use lightweight marshal for enums by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/119296
* [release/10.0] Use DllImportSearchPath.AssemblyDirectory for loading jitinterface library by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/119333

* [release/10.0] Implement out-of-process SetThreadContext support for debugger detach by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/119904

name: .NET 10.0 RC 1
body:
[Release](https://github.com/dotnet/core/releases/tag/v10.0.0-rc.1)

## What's Changed
* Update DBG_MAX_EXECUTABLE_ALLOC_SIZE and EXPECTED_CHUNKSIZE by @tommcdon in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117843
* Serialize unhandled exception for crash dump analysis when ExceptionHandler.RaiseUnhandledExceptionEvent is called by @tommcdon in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117832
* Switch to Azure Linux Arm64 Helix VM hosts by @richlander in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117790
* Couple of small cryptography refactorings by @PranavSenthilnathan in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117850
* Use C# 14's field keyword in more places by @stephentoub in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117817
* Cleanup uses of Interlocked.CompareExchange<object> by @jkotas in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117858
* adding GetAppDomainStoreData cDAC API by @rcj1 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117633
* Delete AppDomain::m_Stage by @jkotas in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117857
* Fix using your build instructions by @jkotas in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117874
* [mono] fallback to scalar operation for ExtractMostSignificantBits by @saitama951 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117276
* [Android] Improve InvariantGlobalization support for CoreCLR Android by @davidnguyen-tech in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117748
* Fix ILLink ref assembly build breaks by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117875
* cleanup memory after UnflushedBytes_HandlesLargeValues test by @pedrobsaila in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117115
* [browser] Remove placeholder for docs link from warning by @maraf in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117810
* Teach regex about more disjoint sets by @stephentoub in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117869
* Disable IL offset mapping validation by @jakobbotsch in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117809
* Add searched .NET install locations to error message by @elinor-fung in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117796
* GetAppDomainList cDAC implementation by @rcj1 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117515
* Update area-owners.md by @StephenMolloy in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117511
* [mono][2/2] Add SIMD Support for s390x by @saitama951 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116779
* Delete ECHash by @jkotas in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117861
* Fix ML-DSA PKCS8 copying bug by @PranavSenthilnathan in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117847
* Update area-owners for libraries ownership changes by @jeffhandley in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117746

name: .NET 9.0.9
body:
[Release](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/releases/tag/v9.0.9)

## What's Changed
* [automated] Merge branch 'release/9.0' => 'release/9.0-staging' by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117671

name: .NET 10.0 Preview 7
body:
[Release](https://github.com/dotnet/core/releases/tag/v10.0.0-preview.7)

## What's Changed
* Unwrap RCWs that are passed to Marshal.GetIUnknownForObject when using the global marshalling ComWrappers instance by @jkoritzinsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115436
* Harden CancelSendPingAsync tests by @antonfirsov in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116588
* Add few interpreter bringup diagnostic improvements by @janvorli in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116699
* Virtual stub indirect call profiling by @AndyAyersMS in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116453
* Generalize HTTP/2 trailer tests to cover HTTP/3 by @antonfirsov in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116113
* JIT: Properly check spilling around fat pointer calls by @jakobbotsch in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116692
* [cDAC] Move AMD64 Unwinder to managed code by @max-charlamb in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116488
* Add constrained support for calls by @BrzVlad in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116702
* Bump main to .NET 10 Preview 7 by @jozkee in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116724
* Add CollectionsMarshal.AsBytes(BitArray) by @stephentoub in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116308
* Add an entry on the coding style for primary constructors by @jkoritzinsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116723
* Fix the compiler toolset override for runtime-async by @agocke in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116722
* Folds CCW VTables for root COM interfaces by @dongle-the-gadget in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116289
* Implement SVE2 ShiftLeftLogical Intrinsics by @snickolls-arm in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116380
* Fix remaining uses of hccall by @davidwrighton in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116561
* JIT: Propagate GC safe point flag in `fgSplitBlockAtBeginning` by @amanasifkhalid in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116718
* Fix HttpClientHandler.CreateNativeHandler implementation by @jkoritzinsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116707
* JIT: Reduce heuristics-derived edge likelihoods into throw blocks found by morph by @amanasifkhalid in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116637
* [cDAC] Support x86 stackwalking by @max-charlamb in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116072
* Fix HTTP/2 pings not working with zero connection lifetime by @Copilot in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115735
* Generate rank information in BulkType events by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116749
* Add ModuleBaseAddress to ETW manifest by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116744
* Disable `System.Runtime.InteropServices.JavaScript.Tests` on Windows by @ilonatommy in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116734
* Arm64 SVE: Optimise zero/allbits vectors the same as masks by @a74nh in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115566
* Record struct packing even when falling back to auto layout by @jkoritzinsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116608
* Fix documentation for `Narrow` methods in `Vector128` by @xtqqczze in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116582
* Remove PopCountOperator<T> guards in TrailingZeroCountOperator<T>.Invoke by @alexcovington in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116721
* Update Enumerable.Sequence based on post-merge feedback by @stephentoub in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116793
* Add support for Classify, CompressStore, ExpandLoad, MaskLoad, MaskStore, and MoveMask by @tannergooding in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116708
* dont try to zero-out mapping if VirtualAlloc fails by @mangod9 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116794
* [Linux][EventPipe][UserEvents] Add user events eventpipe support by @mdh1418 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115265
* Fix DAC-ification of the InterpreterFrame::SetContextToInterpMethodContextFrame by @janvorli in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116797
* Fix unhandled exception in tiered compilation thread by @janvorli in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116716
* JIT: remove unnecessary inlining restriction by @AndyAyersMS in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116773
* Add missing RemoteExecutor.IsSupported by @jkotas in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116809
* JIT: retype more ints during constant prop by @AndyAyersMS in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116759
* [cDAC] Fixes for 32bit platforms by @max-charlamb in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116720
* Reflection.Emit should respect RVAs of 0 by @AaronRobinsonMSFT in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116766
* JSON: Don't mark unmapped properties as read by @PranavSenthilnathan in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116807
* Disable core dumps in host tests that intentionally crash by @elinor-fung in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116725
* [cDAC] X86 support FuncEvalFrame by @max-charlamb in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116796
* Implement SVE2 ShiftLogicalRounded, ShiftLogicalRoundedSaturate by @snickolls-arm in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116784
* PipeWriter.UnflushedBytes long property wraps to negative numbers after int.MaxValue by @pedrobsaila in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115978
* Exclude interpreterTester test on R2R CI legs by @mangod9 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116824
* No information about application is recorded when WindowsEventLog class failed to write event log by @pedrobsaila in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116178
* Implement SVE AddCarryWidening (Upper/Lower) by @jacob-crawley in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116429
* Ldvirtftn implementation for interpreter by @davidwrighton in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116661
* [cDAC] Exclude cDAC changes from unrelated pipeline conditions by @max-charlamb in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116835
* JIT: Emit mulx for GT_MULHI and GT_MUL_LONG if BMI2 is available by @Daniel-Svensson in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116198
* "Convert to GeneratedRegexAttribute" mangles Constants by @Copilot in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116149
* Remove win-arm RID from PortableRuntimeIdentifierGraph.json by @Copilot in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116832
* [cDAC] X86 support TailCallFrame by @max-charlamb in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116792
* [cDAC] Remove references to FEATURE_EH_FUNCLETS by @max-charlamb in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116743
* Make GCDump work on Linux by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116816
* Disable string comparison and library mode tests on Apple mobile by @kotlarmilos in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116813
* Fix Thread::IsAddressInStack for interpreter by @janvorli in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116818
* [browser] Generate javascript bundler friendly Blazor JS initializers by @maraf in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116849
* Implement Interop Type Map support in NativeAOT by @jkoritzinsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116355
* [HTTP/3] Handle all QUIC exceptions in H/3 stream by @ManickaP in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116851
* Use emitLastGroup that works for single/multi align instructions by @kunalspathak in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116843
* JIT: Don't transform infinite loops in `fgOptimizeBranchToEmptyUnconditional` by @amanasifkhalid in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116822
* [tests][exceptions] Abbreviate long native test path by @mdh1418 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116841
* JIT: Fix likelihoods in range test bool opts by @amanasifkhalid in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116867
* [cDAC] X86 support HijackFrame by @max-charlamb in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116829
* update comment by @kunalspathak in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116869
* [cDAC] Move ARM64 Stackwalking to managed code by @max-charlamb in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116717
* [Json] Remove unnecessary Debug.Asserts by @BrennanConroy in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116833
* Remove `AppDomain` parameter for `Debugger::InitIPCEvent` by @elinor-fung in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116871
* Add equality to MLDsaAlgorithm and add tests by @vcsjones in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116750
* JIT: avoid creating unnecessary temp for indirect virtual stub calls by @AndyAyersMS in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116875
* Add MLDsaCng into Microsoft.Bcl.Cryptography by @PranavSenthilnathan in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116678
* Make HttpWebRequest.GetRequestStream return same instance (fixes #41403) by @Lukeuke in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116757
* Make sure to remove operand of TernaryLogic node by @kunalspathak in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116876
* Tensor doc improvements by @gewarren in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116562
* Allow the vector and scalar code paths for min, max, and fma APIs to share logic by @tannergooding in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116804
* Change g_fEEShutDown to be Volatile by @jkotas in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116885
* Fix FileSystemWatcher state cleanup on dispose/finalization on Windows by @stephentoub in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116830
* Cleanup unused code from nativeaot and ilc by @huoyaoyuan in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116480
* Enable vectorization of TensorPrimitives.ConvertTruncating for float/double by @stephentoub in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116895
* Simplify generic floating point->integer conversions by @jkotas in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116896
* Optimize '[Guid]' parsing on Native AOT by @Sergio0694 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116324
* Simplify TryConvert for Half, Int128 and UInt128 by @jkotas in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116902
* JIT: Allow liveness to remove some nodes with contained side effects by @jakobbotsch in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116819
* [wasm] Bump chrome for testing - linux: 137.0.7151.119, windows: 138.0.7204.35 by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116893
* Remove unsafe keyword from some SVE2 intrinsics by @snickolls-arm in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116915
* Override type load limit in AssemblyBinder::GetNameForDiagnosticsFromManagedALC by @jkotas in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116900
* Ensure FMA optimizations kick in under embedded broadcast by @tannergooding in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116891
* Support Null configuration by @tarekgh in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116677
* [mono][gc] Fix gc descriptor computation for InlineArray structs by @BrzVlad in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116879
* Vectorize TensorPrimitives.CosineSimilarity<Half> by @stephentoub in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116898
* Implement CORINFO_FIELD_INTRINSIC_ZERO and _ISLITTLEENDIAN by @janvorli in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116853
* Update ILLink analyzer generated testcases by @sbomer in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116932
* [mono] support nullable types in mono BitCast intrinsic by @lewing in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116874
* [cDAC] Support ISOSDacInterface16 by @max-charlamb in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116938
* Adding debugger step-through attributes to static helpers by @rcj1 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116935
* [EventPipe][UserEvents] Add copy of user_events structs by @mdh1418 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116930
* Fix ILogB for subnormal values by @huoyaoyuan in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116913
* Adding push2/pop2 by @DeepakRajendrakumaran in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116035
* ML-DSA + COSE improve tests by @krwq in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116543
* Fix building coreclr SPC inside VS by @ViktorHofer in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116925
* Fix buffer slicing in (U)Int128 property name serialization by @Copilot in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116868
* System.IO.Pipes: Fix typo in comment by @yaakov-h in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116954
* Streamline ConcurrentDictionary.Enumerator.MoveNext by @stephentoub in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116949
* Avoid unnecessary allocations of jump stubs by @jkotas in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116944
* Update fgMorphHWIntrinsic to more closely follow fgMorphSmpOp by @tannergooding in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116892
* [HTTP] Stricter header value validation by @ManickaP in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116634
* Fix test Http3_WaitForConnection_RecordedWhenWaitingForStream by @antonfirsov in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116741
* Add trimming intrinsic for EventInfo.EventHandlerType.GetMethod("Invoke") by @sbomer in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116931
* Disable WER for host test apps that intentionally crash by @elinor-fung in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116936
* [clr-interp] Implement support for `CEE_CASTCLASS` and static field helper by @kotlarmilos in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116957
* Make SingleFile BundleID the expected length (12 bytes) by @jtschuster in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116656
* Use runtime formatting for ILLink by @sbomer in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116941
* Try fixing native AOT outerloop runs by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116961
* Extend a few TensorPrimitive optimizations to nint/nuint by @stephentoub in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116945
* Enable TensorPrimitive vectorization for Half for lots of methods by @stephentoub in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116934
* Fix typo in SpinOnceCore comment by @mkhlone in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116980
* [browser] JSExport missing global:: by @pavelsavara in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116960
* [RISC-V] Reverse unordered FP comparisons in branches by @tomeksowi in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115943
* Capture build-id in module load events on Linux by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116865
* `ISOSDacInterface::GetMethodDescName` use proper path separator in cross-dac scenarios by @max-charlamb in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116981
* Fix a typo in GC comment by @namu-lee in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117013
* Fix ClientWebSocket hang with HttpVersionPolicy.RequestVersionOrHigher by correcting operator precedence by @Copilot in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116817
* Implement various SVE2 Right Shift intrinsics by @snickolls-arm in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116914
* [cDAC] ARM Stackwalking by @max-charlamb in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116645
* Fix JsonIgnore behavior on init-only properties in source generation mode by @ardabada in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112924
* JIT: switch escape analysis flagging to look for calls returning `IEnumerator<T>` by @AndyAyersMS in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116978
* Use the better pseudo-names where available on xarch by @tannergooding in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116923
* JIT: GDV Cleanup Phase by @AndyAyersMS in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116992
* Fix URI edge case issue by @lilinus in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116789
* Add WebSocketStream by @stephentoub in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116729
* Use secret arg to determine if reverse pinvoke is ILStub or not by @hoyosjs in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117035

* Do not assert IsSupported in DefaultValueAttribute ctor by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117042

* Re-enable DynamicObjects test by @sbomer in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116972
* JIT: Update switch likelihoods after peeling dominant case by @amanasifkhalid in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116984
* Actually change the length of BundleID to 12 by @jtschuster in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116986
* Add support for application-specific settings files in Host defaults by @Copilot in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116987
* Fix typos in GC comments by @namu-lee in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117036
* JIT: Fix assert in object allocation phase by @AndyAyersMS in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117066
* Add equality to SlhDsaAlgorithm by @vcsjones in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117069
* Shared generics opcodes by @davidwrighton in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116990
* converting eventsource metadata list to a dict by @rcj1 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117031

* JIT: Generalize flow edge redirection logic by @amanasifkhalid in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116933

* JIT: Update base mask size for widening float conversion instructions by @saucecontrol in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117075

* Update .slnx files due to recent P2P changes and add sfx.slnx by @ViktorHofer in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117494
* [RISC-V] Conditional simple operations by @tomeksowi in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116581
* [NativeAOT] Fix floating pointer register unwinding by @jkotas in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117588
* [Android] Disable Android CoreCLR emulator tests due to capacity issues by @kotlarmilos in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117650
* [clr-interp] Implement intrinsics for startup path by @kotlarmilos in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117263
* Fix ExecutionManager::GetCodeMethodDesc for interpreter by @janvorli in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117625
* JIT: tolerate missing compile time class handle during assertion prop by @AndyAyersMS in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117631
* Allow SVE mask patterns to be empty by @a74nh in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117376
* Arm64 SVE: Add mask to nonfaulting loads by @a74nh in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117606
* [EventPipe] End user_events session upon continuation_stream closure by @mdh1418 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117435
* [RuntimeAsync] Make JitOptimizeAwait not a release switch. by @VSadov in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117574
* [mono] Fix crash while debugging AOT'ed app. by @thaystg in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117627
* Avoid reporting incorrect thread context to Watson by @tommcdon in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117522
* Resolve missing `Assert.IsType` method in RuntimeBinder tests by @lewing in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117657
* Fix regex timeout test by reducing timeout from 10ms to 1ms by @Copilot in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117617
* Fix intermittent PerformanceCounter test failures due to file access conflicts by @Copilot in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117619
* [PERF] Removed building of musl artifacts from performance related pipelines by @LoopedBard3 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117628
* Interpreter P/Invoke support by @kg in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115393
* adding GetPendingReJITID cDAC API by @rcj1 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117533
* GetAssemblyModuleList cDAC implementation by @rcj1 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117452
* SVE2: Correcting the naming of AddWidening intrinsics by @jacob-crawley in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117508
* Convert CoreCLR classic debug logging to use the minipal mutex by @jkoritzinsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117689
* Fix the isEmbeddedMaskingCompatible checks by @tannergooding in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117607
* Unify certificate validation code on OSX between SslStream and QuicConnection by @rzikm in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117611
* [Android] InvariantGlobalization support for CoreCLR Android builds by @davidnguyen-tech in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117542
* Use python from package in mono AOT cross build as well on browser/wasm by @akoeplinger in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117626
* Optimize Dictionary.FindValue for constant keys (no constant folding) by @EgorBo in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117427
* Correctly restore floating point context on x86 interop step-in scenarios by @tommcdon in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117632
* Avoid populating shared patch bypass buffer after initial creation by @tommcdon in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117514
* Stop building System.Security.Cryptography.Native.OpenSsl on macOS by @vcsjones in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117465
* Fix interpreter passing managed "this" in presence of return buffer by @janvorli in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117661
* [interp] Some cleanups and fixes for CLR interpreter by @kg in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117610
* [Android] Temporarily disable emulator library tests on Android by @kotlarmilos in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117703
* Carry ExtractMostSignificantBits through to LIR and add constant folding support by @tannergooding in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117673
* [clr-interp] Add support for Vector64 and Vector128 return/argument types in interpreter stubs by @kotlarmilos in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117668
* [Android] Enable `System.Runtime.Loader` tests on CoreCLR Android by @kotlarmilos in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117713
* arm64: Fix Sve2 Subtract API by @jonathandavies-arm in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117702
* Implement various SVE2 Multiply Instructions by @snickolls-arm in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117660
* Do not send DB_IPCE_LOAD_ASSEMBLY event by @thaystg in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117680
* Fix passing class handle to RuntimeTypeHandle.GetRuntimeTypeFromHandle for synchronized methods by @elinor-fung in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117675
* Maintain DAC field offsets in EECodeGenManager by @tommcdon in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117721
* JIT: Mark throw blocks with heuristic-derived weights as rarely run during morph by @amanasifkhalid in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117692
* JIT: Store unique switch successors in `BBswtDesc` by @amanasifkhalid in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117423
* Fix llvm-libunwind context sizes by @am11 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/114105
* Move MethodContextReader to use the minipal mutex by @jkoritzinsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117685
* Fix metric tests timeout issue by @tarekgh in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117630
* Fix NativeAOT COM custom query interface exception handling by @janvorli in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117691
* Implement SVE2 Rounded Arithmetic Intrinsics by @snickolls-arm in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117719
* Mark `DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.All` as `EditorBrosable(Never)` by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117720
* Support HashML-DSA on Windows by @vcsjones in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117613
* Drop usage of `.All` on `DefaultValueAttribute` by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117708
* Forward CancellationToken in Task-based Socket.ConnectAsync by @antonfirsov in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116943
* Make Pkcs12LoaderLimits.AllowDuplicateAttributes public by @vcsjones in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117674
* Bump ML-KEM test vectors by @vcsjones in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117687
* Fix BuildChainCustomTrustStore test by @vcsjones in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117734
* Assert pointer relocs are aligned by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113069
* Allow caching IDynamicInterfaceCastable results by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117646
* Disallow inline arrays with explicit size by @VSadov in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117578
* [Android] Reenable SocketsHttpHandlerTest.LargeHeaders_TrickledOverTime_ProcessedEfficiently on 64-bit Android by @simonrozsival in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117710
* update R2R NativeFormat docs by @max-charlamb in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117487
* Fixed typos in header comment of TimeSpan.cs  by @AldeRoberge in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117621
* Fix issue with dynamic runtime binding in Microsoft.CSharp test by @Copilot in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117705
* JIT: Preparatory refactoring to support multiple defs per single node by @jakobbotsch in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117662
* [Mono][Win] Incorrect decomposition of simd calls by @saitama951 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116433
* JIT: Unify block successor iteration logic by @amanasifkhalid in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117743
* Fix a few runtime async stub issues by @jakobbotsch in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117418
* Client-side TLS 1.3 support on OSX by @rzikm in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117428
* [browser] Migrate WebAssemblyHotReloadCapabilities from Blazor to WasmSDK by @maraf in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117747
* Adding GetTLSIndex cDAC implementation by @rcj1 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117587
* [HTTP] WinHTTP fix exception by @ManickaP in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117756
* Remove Uri length limits by @MihaZupan in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117287
* Change Key on MLDsaCng to GetKey method by @vcsjones in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117741
* JIT: Fix unique successors in `BBswtDesc` in async by @jakobbotsch in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117759
* Skip optimization in getHelperFtn if NativeCodeVersion is null by @max-charlamb in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117765
* Delete WellKnownTypeExtensions.cs by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117770
* Disable data dehydration on Windows by default by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117751
* Default Http3Support to false for PublishTrimmed by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117655
* Drop usage of `.All` in Microsoft.Extensions by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117707
* Improve gtDispConst for CNS_STR by @EgorBo in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117350
* Ignore always-true relops in optRelopTryInferWithOneEqualOperand by @EgorBo in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117749
* Adding the BigMul API to nint, nuint, Int128, and UInt128 by @tannergooding in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117740
* Update Task.cs to return directly for one task from Task.WhenAll by @CuteLeon in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117715
* [EventPipe][UserEvents] Deduplicate EventPipeEvent Metadata emission by @mdh1418 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117686
* Properly dispose intermediate certificates in SslStream by @rzikm in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117667
* Make it possible to order methods by specifying symbolic names by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117537
* Clear contained flag from AND->NOT transformation by @EgorBo in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117801
* Fold generic method bodies by default by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117411
* Report folded method bodies in the MSTAT file by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117459
* [STJ] Fix formatting of flag enums when values are overlapping. by @eiriktsarpalis in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117730
* [HTTP] H/3 fix test closing server connection prematurely by @ManickaP in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117458
* [NET] Use SetCurrentStackTrace for not thrown exceptions by @ManickaP in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117802
* Report unhandled async exceptions by @janvorli in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117799
* [main] Source code updates from dotnet/dotnet by @dotnet-maestro[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117590
* [Android] Expand smoke tests for CoreCLR Android by @kotlarmilos in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117767
* [browser] Clean up HotReload check by @maraf in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117803
* Remove IsWatchOS checks for consistency by @davidnguyen-tech in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117653
* [clr-interp] Enable SIMD feature for callstubgenerator.cpp on supported architectures by @kotlarmilos in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117769
* [HTTP Telemetry] Prioritize Host header when emitting `server.address` by @antonfirsov in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117540
* [mono][1/2] Add SIMD Support for s390x by @saitama951 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116669
* Use a ReaderWriterLockSlim in RcwCache by @jkoritzinsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117792
* Composite ML-DSA + RSA Managed Composer by @PranavSenthilnathan in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117259
* SVE2 API for MaxNumberPairwise, MaxPairwise, MinNumberPairwise and MinPairwise by @jacob-crawley in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117711
* arm64: Add Sve2 Saturating functions by @jonathandavies-arm in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117758
* Add CompilerLoweringPreserveAttribute by @sbomer in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117729
* Use compiler-lowered DAM when trimming by @sbomer in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117624
* [wasm] Make sure we use bash environment for emsdk_env.sh script by @akoeplinger in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117833
* JIT: constrain max IL size for OSR inlining by @AndyAyersMS in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117816
* JIT: Consider conditionally executed loop statements for hoisting by @amanasifkhalid in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117829
* SVE2 API DotProductComplex and DotProductComplexBySelectedIndex by @jacob-crawley in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117706
* Add some additional Tensor APIs by @tannergooding in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117739
* [release/10.0-preview7] Fix ILLink ref assembly build breaks by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117916
* [release/10.0-preview7] [Json] JsonSerializer+PipeReader support by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117906
* [release/10.0-preview7] New JsonValue derived class for JSON primitives by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117917
* [10.0-preview7] Update DBG_MAX_EXECUTABLE_ALLOC_SIZE and EXPECTED_CHUNKSIZE by @tommcdon in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117912
* [10.0-preview7] Serialize unhandled exception for crash dump analysis when ExceptionHandler.RaiseUnhandledExceptionEvent is called by @tommcdon in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117913
* [release/10.0-preview7] Revert "Show specific error message for `dotnet <app_path>` where app_path is a non-dll/exe file that exists" by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/118065
* [release/10.0-preview7] Don't do an invalid mask conversion optimization for conditional select nodes by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/118167

## New Contributors
* @Lukeuke made their first contribution in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116757
* @mkhlone made their first contribution in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116980
* @namu-lee made their first contribution in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117013
* @ardabada made their first contribution in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112924
* @Flu made their first contribution in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111229
* @petrroll made their first contribution in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117334
* @GlitchedCode922 made their first contribution in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117417
* @AldeRoberge made their first contribution in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117621
* @CuteLeon made their first contribution in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117715

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/compare/v10.0.0-preview.6.25358.103...v10.0.0-preview.7.25380.108

name: .NET 10.0 Preview 6
body:
[Release](https://github.com/dotnet/core/releases/tag/v10.0.0-preview.6)

## What's Changed
* Reapply "Create a single copy of stub templates by @davidwrighton in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115749
* Correct XML doc of Volatile.WriteBarrier() by @tfenise in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115803

* [mono][interp] Add possibility to configure interp options from env var by @BrzVlad in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116215
* [mono][interp] Update var definition when inserting new instructions during cprop by @BrzVlad in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116179
* JIT: Remove PUTARG_SPLIT by @jakobbotsch in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116074
* Remove ProtectByRefsFrame by @filipnavara in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116288
* JIT: Graph-based loop inversion by @amanasifkhalid in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116017
* [Android] Enable library smoke tests on CoreCLR Android by @kotlarmilos in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116091
* Fix PAL tests by @jkotas in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116197
* Check containment for op3 for ternary instruction by @kunalspathak in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116229
* [main] Source code updates from dotnet/dotnet by @dotnet-maestro[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116145
* JIT: Fix `Compiler::printfAlloc` for long strings by @jakobbotsch in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116306
* Fix no-argument ./build.sh invocation by @jkoritzinsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116315
* Unbounded memory leak from DependencyInjectionEventSource by @pedrobsaila in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115974
* Fix bootstrap paths to include TargetRid for platform-specific directories by @Copilot in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116302
* [browser] rename MSBuild property WasmPerfTracing to EnableDiagnostics  by @pavelsavara in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116253
* [NativeAOT] Add sampling profiler by @filipnavara in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/108083
* Emit an error message if the runtime fails to initialize, instead of just silently aborting by @JinShil in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116171
* Update coding-style.md by @tonyhallett in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116317
* Use throw stubs in ref assemblies for collection interfaces by @Sergio0694 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116309
* Enable RhpNewObjectArrayFast optimization on NativeAOT by @filipnavara in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116290
* Improve a few more IList/Collection => IReadOnlyList/Collection checks by @stephentoub in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116313
* Ensure that embedded mask handling is covering the right scenarios by @tannergooding in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116201
* Delete DacVirtualUnwind by @jkotas in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116286
* [RISC-V] Simplifying the loop generated in genZeroInitFrameUsingBlockInit by @sirntar in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116011
* Fix bash array expansion by @akoeplinger in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116321
* Rename Redhawk to NativeAOT by @kasperk81 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116209
* Remove a few unsafe bits in S.P.Uri, S.N.Ping, System.Transactions.Local by @EgorBo in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116281
* Fix various HTTP header parsing issues by @MihaZupan in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116323
* [RuntimeAsync] Adding a simple test for reflection with async methods. by @VSadov in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116329
* [browser][WBT] fix BlazorEventPipeTestWithMetrics test by @pavelsavara in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116334
* Implement SVE2 ShiftArithmeticRounded, ShiftArithmeticRoundedSaturate, ShiftArithmeticSaturate by @snickolls-arm in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115774
* Improve the interpreter internal diagnostic capabilities by @davidwrighton in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116162
* [cDAC] Implement sign extension for ClrDataAddresses by @max-charlamb in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116222
* Fix PropertyPolicies to consider both getter and setter accessibility by @Copilot in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116080
* Fix crossgen2 sometimes emitting tokens from the wrong module by @kg in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/114172
* Update Linux versions in Libraries pipeline by @richlander in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115756
* Convert STORE_BLK into STORIND for SIMD by @EgorBo in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116265
* Enable ML-DSA on Windows by @PranavSenthilnathan in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116291
* Remove dead code from arm/arm64/loongarch64 stub linker by @filipnavara in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116349
* Dispose all resources used in CmsSignature by @PranavSenthilnathan in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115666
* Add StringComparison to ClaimsIdentity by @vcsjones in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116352
* Debug logger should print exceptions even if the formatted message is empty by @colejohnson66 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116339
* Remove dead code for parsing/emitting X86 instructions by @filipnavara in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116292
* Avoid building JITs for cross tools when unnecessary by @jakobbotsch in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116332
* Fix NativeAOT outer loop test failure by @jkotas in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116362
* Correct sequence point comment by @noahfalk in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116366
* Fix conversion opcode emit for implicit conversion part of conditional branches by @BrzVlad in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116367
* SPMI: Handle BRANCH26 relocs similar to REL32 relocs by @jakobbotsch in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116340
* arm64: Implement missing SVE extract methods by @jonathandavies-arm in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116095
* Implement SVE2 AbsoluteDifferenceWidening(Upper/Lower) by @jacob-crawley in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116268
* Optimize Vector.Max codegen using AVX512 by @alexcovington in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116117
* Trace out error code when creating single-file bundle extraction directory fails by @elinor-fung in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116342
* Make single-file test cases delete extraction directory after test run by @elinor-fung in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116347
* Normalize TYP_STRUCT to TYP_SIMD in impInlineUnboxNullable by @EgorBo in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116372
* JIT: Allow baseline intrinsics in JIT code unconditionally by @saucecontrol in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116196
* Revert change to follow symlinks of dotnet host  by @agocke in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115315
* Add JIT/VM support for the approved but NYI xarch isas by @tannergooding in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116230
* Partial revert of "Delete LOADEDMODULES cache", additional cleanup by @jkotas in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116374
* [browser] Remove custom cache by @maraf in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/114901
* Use `Unsafe.BitCast` in `System.Array` by @xtqqczze in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116404
* Delete SCAN contract annotations by @jkotas in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116182
* Cleanup LowLevelList usage in GCLayout by @huoyaoyuan in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116316
* NativeAOT: Unhijack thread in sampling profiler before starting stack walk by @filipnavara in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116409
* Use `Unsafe.BitCast` in `System.Guid` by @xtqqczze in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116415
* Fix trigger for linkable-framework label policy by @jkotas in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116417
* Fix invalid IL in RefFields test - remove ldind.ref on value type references by @Copilot in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116416
* Delete unnecessary or condition by @jkotas in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116418
* Revert removal of embedModuleHandle and embedFieldHandle by @EgorBo in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116036
* Delete always-null unwContext by @am11 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116397
* Delete extra layers by @jkotas in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116405
* [browser] Fix dev tools profiler by @pavelsavara in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116387
* JIT: fix issue in assertion prop phi inference by @AndyAyersMS in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116326
* remove x86 ICF special handling by @max-charlamb in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116388
* Interpreter shared generics support by @davidwrighton in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116357
* Fix telemetry for redirect + custom ICredentials by @antonfirsov in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115939
* Delete MultilevelSDKLookup test class by @elinor-fung in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116396
* Fix minidump generation - check if IsIL before calling methods related to it by @thaystg in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116391
* [clr-interp] Implement array support for reference and value types by @kotlarmilos in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116384
* PreHash SLH-DSA by @PranavSenthilnathan in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115509
* Adjust area owners for diagnostics and type system by @steveisok in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116443
* JIT/AOT to interpreter calls support by @janvorli in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116353
* Fix struct ReturnKind on SysV AMD64. by @zengandrew in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116194
* Implement CONV_OVF_xxx in the Interpreter by @kg in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116356
* [infra][Apple] Fix Apple mobile runtime test reporting by @matouskozak in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/114862
* JIT: Fix dumping of empty exception set during CSE by @jakobbotsch in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116472
* Add JsonElement.Parse by @stephentoub in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116363
* Remove ArrLen propagation from earlyprop by @EgorBo in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116410
* Fix rangecheck bug: GT_LSH may actually overflow the index by @EgorBo in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116470
* JIT: Fix tailcall rehoming logic for some interfering operands by @jakobbotsch in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116468
* Record OperationCanceledException in HttpClient native instrumentation by @joegoldman2 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116269
* Use UnsafeAccessorType in System.Private.CoreLib and the BCL by @jkoritzinsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115583
* Fix ILLink check for function pointer equality by @sbomer in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116435
* Fix stresslog facility and log level mix-up. by @lateralusX in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116467
* arm64: Rename ConditionalExtract arguments by @jonathandavies-arm in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116216
* arm64: Rename CreateBreak/CreateMask args by @jonathandavies-arm in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116255
* Additional cleanup and simplification of hwintrinsic instruction sets for xarch by @tannergooding in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116406
* SPMI: Run 64-bit diffs on OSX.14.Arm64.Open by @jakobbotsch in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116299
* Fix BulkType event for GC static bases by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116479
* Revert "Make mutable generic collection interfaces implement read-only collection interfaces" and related changes by @tannergooding in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116497
* ML-DSA+COSE by @krwq in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115158
* Revert "Switch away from AzureLinux host docker testing temporarily (#115993)" by @jakobbotsch in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116501
* Fix reporting of foreign native exception not handled by runtime by @janvorli in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115750
* JIT: Ensure profile synthesis converges for trivial cases by @amanasifkhalid in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116502
* Remove more bounds checks for switch by ignoring dont-cse flag for checked bounds by @EgorBo in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116506
* Make BackgroundService run ExecuteAsync as task by @ericstj in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116283
* Remove unused double -> int/uint cast helpers by @saucecontrol in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116484
* Disable certain stackoverflow tests by @kunalspathak in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116535
* Drop support for OpenSSL primitives on macOS by @vcsjones in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116481
* Add Strict JsonSerializerOptions by @PranavSenthilnathan in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116271
* Include symbols in sfx transport packs by @ViktorHofer in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116346
* Sign macOS binaries that aren't signed by @akoeplinger in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116476
* Exclude tail call counts from check to prevent unnecessary EBP frame by @filipnavara in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116413
* Correct some comments in Avx*.cs by @tfenise in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115056
* Harden `Ping_TimedOut_*` tests by @antonfirsov in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116500
* Map version for Tahoe compatibility. by @vcsjones in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116536
* Fix libhost scenarios (COM, C++/CLI, custom component host) incorrect coreclr path determination by @elinor-fung in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116504
* Do not run SVE when HWIntrinsic is OFF by @kunalspathak in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116441
* ML-KEM: Windows ephemeral implementation by @vcsjones in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116440
* Deliver Posix signals in reverse order of their registration by @jkotas in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116557
* Delete unused functions in eventtrace by @elinor-fung in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116565
* [Android] Install brotli static libraries in CoreCLR Android pack by @kotlarmilos in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116529
* Fix bug in interpreter finally call islands generation by @janvorli in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116560
* Arm64 SVE: Do not remove embedded conditional selects by @a74nh in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116144
* ML-DSA Certificates on Windows (NCrypt support) by @PranavSenthilnathan in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116394
* Tag dotnet/jit-contrib for JIT related changes by @jkotas in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116589
* Fix build to use new method name by @vcsjones in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116591

* Implementation of ldftn and calli by @davidwrighton in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116449
* Updated PCA of DAC cert by @hoyosjs in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116507
* Refactor MachObjectFile signature blobs by @jtschuster in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116566
* Fix a couple error cases in Json parsing by @BrennanConroy in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116446
* Add support for the Avx512 Compress/Expand intrinsics by @tannergooding in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116567
* Revert partial changes for `thread_local` convergence. by @AaronRobinsonMSFT in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116512
* Revert "Fix reporting of foreign native exception not handled by runt… by @tommcdon in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116621
* [clr-interp] Emit INTOP_NEWMDARR only for array ctor  by @kotlarmilos in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116544
* Add option to disable particular TLS signature algorithms by @rzikm in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/114741
* [main] Source code updates from dotnet/dotnet by @dotnet-maestro[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116583
* Add ability to filter interpreted methods by assembly by @janvorli in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116569
* Copy integer registers on AMD64 architecture for debugger stackwalking by @tommcdon in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116617
* arm64: Add InterleavingXorEvenOdd & InterleavingXorOddEven by @jonathandavies-arm in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116525
* Partial revert of #111408 by @tommcdon in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116618
* Add deduplication info to OneFuzz fuzzing crash work items by @MihaZupan in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116615
* [browser] Bundler friendly output by @maraf in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116300
* RangeCheck: Don't create invalid ranges by @EgorBo in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113935
* [main] Update dependencies from dotnet/hotreload-utils, dotnet/icu, dotnet/runtime-assets by @dotnet-maestro[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115709
* SignedCms add tests and reduce allocations by @PranavSenthilnathan in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116400
* getHelperFtn support for getting CORINFO_METHOD_HANDLE by @davidwrighton in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116603
* SLH-DSA cleanup comments, SPKI formatting and tests by @PranavSenthilnathan in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116452
* ML-DSA: Add BCrypt support in Microsoft.Bcl.Cryptography by @PranavSenthilnathan in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116616
* JIT: Exclude `BB_UNITY_WEIGHT` scaling from `BasicBlock::isBBWeightCold` by @amanasifkhalid in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116548
* Don't allow inlining the NativeAOT-only unsafe accessor by @jkoritzinsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116646
* Remove "Host Breakable" lock concept by @jkoritzinsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116611
* BypassReadyToRun when initializing ProbabilisticMap by @MihaZupan in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115811
* Improve handling of dynamic types in BulkType events by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116629
* Add {Async}Enumerable.{Infinite}Sequence by @stephentoub in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116538
* Remove the code pitching feature. by @AaronRobinsonMSFT in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116662
* JIT: Move loop inversion to after loop recognition by @amanasifkhalid in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115850
* Tensor<T> select. Iteration along dimensions by @michaelgsharp in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113697
* Fix exception message for InvalidCastException thrown by unboxing by @jkotas in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116672
* Include the frame register when copying arm32 debugger stackwalk context by @tommcdon in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116663
* Skip SSL key log test for OpenSSL 3.5+ by @rokonec in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116474
* Change HttpClient/SslStream default certificate revocation check mode to Online by @rzikm in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116098
* Fix typo in System.Net.Security Strings.resx by @akoeplinger in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116673
* Add option to run coreclr tests using interpreter by @janvorli in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116570
* Avoid CORINFO_..._HANDLEs in JIT helper signatures by @jkotas in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116675
* Generate module rundown events by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116338
* Document important nuances about Dictionary/HashSet by @kg in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112760
* Fix EmitCall in the interpreter compiler by @janvorli in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116654
* Add System.Formats.Cbor to the ASP.NET Core transport package by @MackinnonBuck in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116602
* Remove readdir_r entirely and handle filenames > 255 bytes by @jozkee in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116639
* Enable multi-dim array interpreter test by @kg in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115916
* [browser] Update wasmbrowser template by @maraf in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116690
* Fix absolute path check when loading hostfxr/hostpolicy/coreclr by @elinor-fung in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116597
* Fix stackwalk from interpreted EH funclet by @janvorli in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116640
* Fix caught foreign native exception handling take 2 by @janvorli in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116693
* Fix nullable annotations on MLKemAlgorithm and add ToString by @vcsjones in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116635
* Improve exceptions thrown by MLKem when key types aren't available. by @vcsjones in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116590
* Implement interpreter CEE_ADD_OVF and CEE_SUB_OVF opcodes by @janvorli in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116694
* Update host test command execution logging: include PID on exit, remove confusing OK/FAIL, add caller name by @elinor-fung in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116658
* Remove debugreturn.h and machinery around preventing returns by @jkoritzinsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116563
* DriveInfo.Linux: use procfs mountinfo for formats and mount point paths. by @tmds in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116102
* [release/10.0-preview6] Record struct packing even when falling back to auto layout by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116770
* [release/10.0-preview6] Fix HttpClientHandler.CreateNativeHandler implementation by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116767
* [release/10.0-preview6] JSON: Don't mark unmapped properties as read by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116828
* [10.0-preview6] Revert "Trust single-edge synthetic profile (#116054)" by @AndyAyersMS in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/117403

## New Contributors
* @illnyang made their first contribution in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115964

* @SirCxyrtyx made their first contribution in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/105654
* @JinShil made their first contribution in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116171
* @tonyhallett made their first contribution in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116317
* @colejohnson66 made their first contribution in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116339
* @zengandrew made their first contribution in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116194

name: .NET 9.0.7
body:
[Release](https://github.com/dotnet/core/releases/tag/v9.0.7)

## What's Changed
* [release/9.0-staging] Fix crash during Async Break when APC and CET are enabled by @thaystg in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/114932
* [release/9.0-staging] [STJ] Account for F# CompilationMappingAttribute now supporting multiple declarations. by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115076
* [release/9.0-staging][wasm][interpreter] Fix PackedSimd interpreter intrinsics by @lewing in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/114218
* [release/9.0-staging] JIT: Fix invalid removal of explicit zeroing in methods without .localsinit by @jakobbotsch in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115568
* [release/9.0-staging] throw an exception instead of infinite loop in `sort_mark_list` by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115529
* [release/9.0-staging] [DNS] Ignore ObjectDisposedException on CancellationToken Callback by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115840
* Revert "[release/9.0-staging] Fix crash during Async Break when APC and CET are enabled" by @thaystg in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116015
* [release/9.0-staging] Fix SysV first/second return register GC info mismatch by @jakobbotsch in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116206
* [release/9.0-staging] Fix PipeStream leak on Windows when pipe is disposed with a pending operation by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116188
* [release/9.0] Fix edge cases in Tarjan GC bridge (Android) by @filipnavara in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/114682
* [release/9.0-staging] Revert change to follow symlinks of dotnet host  by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116244
* Update branding to 9.0.7 by @vseanreesermsft in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116312
* [release/9.0-staging] Fix generation of minidump by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115738
* [release/9.0-staging] fix: in rsa signatures, configure digest before padding mode by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115695
* [release/9.0-staging] JIT: Fix possible heap corruption in outlined composite SSA storage by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/116132
* [release/9.0-staging] Update dependencies from dotnet/roslyn by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115984
* [release/9.0-staging] Update dependencies from dotnet/arcade by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115855
