name: v9.0.6
body:
## Bug Fixes

- **Read messages from binlog if process output is missing build finished message ([#114676](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/114676))**  
  Improves reliability of the WebAssembly build process by reading messages from the binlog when the process output does not contain the expected build finished message, preventing build failures in certain scenarios.

- **Fix debugger app hangs related to thread exit ([#114917](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/114917))**  
  Resolves an issue where applications could hang during debugging when threads exit, ensuring smoother debugging experiences and preventing deadlocks.

- **[Mono] Workaround MSVC miscompiling sgen_clz ([#114903](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/114903))**  
  Addresses a compiler miscompilation issue in MSVC affecting the Mono garbage collector, improving runtime stability and correctness on affected platforms.

- **Do not set the salt or info if they are NULL for OpenSSL HKDF ([#114877](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/114877))**  
  Fixes a cryptographic issue by ensuring that the salt or info parameters are not set when they are NULL in OpenSSL HKDF, preventing potential errors or unexpected behavior in key derivation.

- **[Test Only] Fix Idn tests ([#115032](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115032))**  
  Corrects issues in Internationalized Domain Name (Idn) tests, ensuring accurate and reliable test results for domain name handling.

- **JIT: revised fix for fp division issue in profile synthesis ([#115026](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115026))**  
  Provides a more robust fix for floating-point division issues in JIT profile synthesis, improving numerical accuracy and preventing incorrect calculations.

- **Handle OSSL 3.4 change to SAN:othername formatting ([#115361](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115361))**  
  Updates certificate handling to accommodate changes in Subject Alternative Name (SAN) formatting introduced in OpenSSL 3.4, ensuring compatibility and correct parsing of certificates.

- **[Mono] Fix c11 ARM64 atomics to issue full memory barrier ([#115635](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115635))**  
  Fixes atomic operations on ARM64 in Mono to issue a full memory barrier, ensuring correct synchronization and preventing subtle concurrency bugs.

## Performance Improvements

- **[WinHTTP] Certificate caching on WinHttpHandler to eliminate extra call to Custom Certificate Validation ([#114678](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/114678))**  
  Improves HTTP performance by caching certificates in WinHttpHandler, reducing redundant calls to custom certificate validation and speeding up secure connections.

- **Improve distribute_free_regions ([#115167](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115167))**  
  Optimizes memory management by enhancing the algorithm for distributing free memory regions, leading to better memory utilization and potentially improved application performance.

## Technical Improvements

- **Strip trailing slash from source dir for cmake4 ([#114905](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/114905))**  
  Refines build scripts by removing trailing slashes from source directories when using CMake 4, preventing potential build path issues and improving build reliability.

- **Don't expose TrustedCertificatesDirectory() and StartNewTlsSessionContext() to NetFx ([#114995](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/114995))**  
  Restricts certain internal APIs from being exposed to .NET Framework, reducing surface area and preventing unintended usage.

- **Add support for more libicu versions ([#115376](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115376))**  
  Expands compatibility by supporting additional versions of the International Components for Unicode (ICU) library, enhancing globalization features across more environments.

## Infrastructure

- **Run outerloop pipeline only for release branches, not staging/preview ([#115011](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115011))**  
  Optimizes CI/CD resources by limiting the outerloop pipeline to run only on release branches, reducing unnecessary test runs and speeding up development workflows.

- **Update CentOS Stream, Debian, OpenSUSE ([#115027](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115027))**  
  Updates build and test infrastructure to use newer versions of CentOS Stream, Debian, and OpenSUSE, ensuring ongoing compatibility and security with supported Linux distributions.

- **Update MacOS signing to use PME ([#115634](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115634))**  
  Switches MacOS code signing to use PME, improving the security and reliability of the signing process for MacOS releases.

## Dependency Updates

- **Update dependencies from dotnet/roslyn ([#115353](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115353))**  
  Integrates the latest updates from the Roslyn compiler, bringing in bug fixes, performance improvements, and new language features.

- **Update dependencies from dotnet/arcade ([#115085](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115085))**  
  Updates the Arcade build infrastructure dependency, ensuring the latest build tools and scripts are used.

- **Update dependencies from dotnet/sdk ([#114856](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/114856), [#115466](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115466))**  
  Brings in the latest changes from the .NET SDK, improving build reliability and incorporating upstream fixes.

- **Update dependencies from dotnet/icu ([#114762](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/114762), [#115440](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115440))**  
  Updates the ICU library dependency, enhancing globalization support and fixing related issues.

- **Update dependencies from dotnet/cecil ([#114670](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/114670))**  
  Incorporates the latest Mono.Cecil updates, improving assembly manipulation and metadata handling.

- **Update dependencies from dotnet/emsdk ([#114702](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/114702))**  
  Updates the Emscripten SDK dependency, ensuring up-to-date WebAssembly toolchain support.

- **Update dependencies from dotnet/xharness ([#114855](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/114855))**  
  Brings in the latest XHarness test runner updates, improving test automation and reliability.

## Miscellaneous

- **Update branding to 9.0.6 ([#115385](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115385))**  
  Updates version branding throughout the repository to reflect the 9.0.6 release.

- **Fix line endings ([#115413](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115413))**  
  Standardizes line endings across the codebase, improving cross-platform consistency and reducing merge conflicts.

- **[automated] Merge branch 'release/9.0' => 'release/9.0-staging' ([#114700](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/114700))**  
  Automated merge to synchronize changes between release branches, ensuring consistency across development streams.

- **Merging internal commits for release/9.0 ([#115535](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115535))**  
  Integrates internal commits into the release/9.0 branch, consolidating changes for the release.

- **[manual] Merge release/9.0-staging into release/9.0 ([#115497](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115497))**  
  Manually merges staging changes into the main release branch, preparing for the official release.

---

name: v8.0.17
body:
## Bug Fixes

- **Work around MSVC miscompiling sgen_clz** ([#114904](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/114904))  
  Addresses an issue where the Microsoft Visual C++ (MSVC) compiler was miscompiling the `sgen_clz` function in Mono. This workaround ensures correct behavior and stability for affected builds.

- **Fix Idn tests** ([#115030](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115030))  
  Resolves issues in the Internationalized Domain Name (Idn) tests, improving test reliability and ensuring accurate validation of related functionality.

- **Handle OSSL 3.4 change to SAN:othername formatting** ([#115367](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115367))  
  Updates the handling of Subject Alternative Name (SAN) formatting to accommodate changes introduced in OpenSSL 3.4. This ensures compatibility and correct certificate processing.

- **Don't expose TrustedCertificatesDirectory() and StartNewTlsSessionContext() to NetFx** ([#115008](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115008))  
  Prevents certain internal APIs from being exposed to .NET Framework (NetFx), reducing the risk of unintended usage and improving API surface consistency.

- **Fix line endings** ([#115414](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115414))  
  Corrects line ending inconsistencies in the codebase, which helps prevent cross-platform issues and improves code readability.

## Performance Improvements

- **Improve distribute_free_regions** ([#115023](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115023))  
  Optimizes the algorithm for distributing free memory regions, leading to better memory management and potentially improved application performance.

## Technical Improvements

- **Strip trailing slash from source dir for cmake4** ([#114906](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/114906))  
  Refines the build process by removing unnecessary trailing slashes from source directory paths when using CMake 4, reducing potential build errors and improving consistency.

- **Add support for more libicu versions** ([#115378](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115378))  
  Expands compatibility by supporting additional versions of the International Components for Unicode (ICU) library, enhancing globalization features across more environments.

## Infrastructure

- **Update dependencies from dotnet/arcade** ([#114441](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/114441))  
  Refreshes build and engineering dependencies from the Arcade repository, ensuring the latest tooling and infrastructure improvements are incorporated.

- **Migrate MacCatalyst and iOS/tvOS simulator jobs to new queues** ([#114633](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/114633))  
  Moves MacCatalyst and iOS/tvOS simulator jobs to updated build queues (`osx.14.arm64.open` and `osx.15.amd64.open`), improving build reliability and aligning with current infrastructure standards.

- **Run outerloop pipeline only for release branches** ([#115012](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115012))  
  Adjusts CI pipeline triggers so that the outerloop pipeline runs only for release branches, reducing unnecessary builds and streamlining the development workflow.

- **Update OpenSUSE** ([#115028](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115028))  
  Updates support for the OpenSUSE Linux distribution, ensuring compatibility and up-to-date platform support.

- **Update dependencies from dotnet/emsdk** ([#114830](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/114830))  
  Updates the Emscripten SDK dependencies, improving WebAssembly build support and incorporating the latest fixes and features.

- **Update MacOS signing to use PME** ([#115633](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115633))  
  Switches MacOS code signing to use PME (Public Managed Environment), enhancing security and compliance for MacOS builds.

## Miscellaneous

- **Automated merge: 'release/8.0' into 'release/8.0-staging'** ([#114668](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/114668), [#115410](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115410))  
  Merges changes from the main release branch into the staging branch, ensuring all updates are synchronized for the next release cycle.

- **Update branding to 8.0.17** ([#115384](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115384))  
  Updates version branding throughout the repository to reflect the new 8.0.17 release.

- **Merging internal commits for release/8.0** ([#115534](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115534))  
  Integrates various internal commits into the release branch, consolidating recent changes and improvements.

- **Manual merge: release/8.0-staging into release/8.0** ([#115498](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/115498))  
  Manually merges the staging branch back into the main release branch, finalizing the release preparation process.

---

This summary is generated and may contain inaccuracies. For complete details, please review the linked pull requests.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/compare/v8.0.16...v8.0.17

* [infra] Add runtime-llvm to build analysis by @matouskozak in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113086
* Allow `MakeGenericType`/`MakeArrayType` of arbitrary types by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112986
* JIT: Fix icon and vn mismatch in an assertion by @EgorBo in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113072
* JIT: Mark certain intrinsics as non-escaping by @EgorBo in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113093
* Use `WriteDoubleLittleEndian` in `NumericGraphemeInfo` by @xtqqczze in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112611
* [browser] Generate boot config as javascript module by @maraf in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112947
* JIT: stop using ehTrueEnclosingTryIndexIL outside of importation by @AndyAyersMS in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113102
* Support Telemetry Schema Url in tracing and metrics by @tarekgh in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113034
* Use invariant culture when formatting capture transfer in regex source generator by @stephentoub in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113081
* Set AppContext.BaseDirectory and the lookup path for AssemblyDirectory to the directory containing the NativeAOT module by @jkoritzinsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112457
* Move UMEntryThunk to StubPrecode infrastructure by @davidwrighton in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112460
* Harden some reflection invoke tests by @steveharter in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113000
* Disable ARM NEON path in dn_simdhash due to performance issues by @kg in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113092
* Remove unused file Interop.PFXExportCertStore.cs by @vcsjones in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112801
* Fix exception propagation from managed to native on Unix by @janvorli in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112957
* Switch Ubuntu 24.04 testing to use Ubuntu 22.04 temporarily by @jakobbotsch in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113138
* Use TryGetRangeFromAssertions to fold more relops in global assert prop by @EgorBo in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112824
* Fix a debug-assert in assertionprop.cpp by @EgorBo in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113147
* [NRBF] Remove [Experimental] by @adamsitnik in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113021
* Fix test failure from #113051 by @snickolls-arm in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113128
* Fix Sve test templates to avoid buffer overrun by @kunalspathak in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113113
* Cached interface dispatch for coreclr by @davidwrighton in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111771
* Check for an empty string for the TimeZoneDirectory environment variable by @JongHeonChoi in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112831
* Establish runtime-diagnostics pipeline by @steveisok in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113169
* Doc fixes for .NET 10 Preview 1 update by @gewarren in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113027
* [PERF] Add missing ScenarioArgs to the android device startup test runs by @LoopedBard3 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113182
* [main] Update dependencies from dotnet/emsdk by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113175
* [Wasm] Improve error logging for ES6 module assertion by @jeromelaban in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113131
* Fix build breaks by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113179
* Downgrade MethodTables used in reflection invoke by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111610
* [QUIC] Update MsQuic library version by @ManickaP in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113159
* [browser] Pass configured config name to loadBootResource by @maraf in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113210
* Reduce memory footprint of HTTP/2 connections by @MihaZupan in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112719
* Speed up single-value SearchValues<string> candidate verification by @MihaZupan in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/108365
* [browser] avoid locks in ST interop by @pavelsavara in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113046
* Opt labels out of automated issue cleanup by @jeffhandley in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113170
* Revert "Switch Ubuntu 24.04 testing to use Ubuntu 22.04 temporarily (#113138)" by @jakobbotsch in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113207
* Seed in the skeleton of ML-DSA based on current prototyping by @bartonjs in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112891
* Fix encoding missed overridden properties by @tarekgh in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113167
* Generate `.comment` section for ELF executables by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113218
* Pin SHAs for container images by @richlander in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113185
* Delete `ObjectNodeSection.IsStandardSection` by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113217
* Revert "Set AppContext.BaseDirectory and the lookup path for AssemblyDirectory to the directory containing the NativeAOT module" by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113211
* fix: correct ArgumentException formatting in NativeAOT #113016 by @TickThunder in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113163
* Add SymmetricAlgorithm.SetKey(ROSpan) by @bartonjs in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113146
* Better ARM intrinsics implementation for dn_simdhash by @kg in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113095
* JIT: Fix edge likelihoods in `fgOptimizeBranch` by @amanasifkhalid in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113235
* Add CreateChained to RateLimiter by @manandre in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107230
* [browser] rename WasmPerfTracing by @pavelsavara in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113222
* [mono] Fix detecting [DisableRuntimeMarshalling] in MarshalingPInvokeScanner. by @rolfbjarne in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112981
* [browser][http] mute JS exceptions about network errors + HEAD verb by @pavelsavara in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113014
* Bump rollup from 4.18.0 to 4.34.9 in /src/mono/browser/runtime by @dependabot in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113129
* Bounds checks: make MergeEdgeAssertions more precise by @EgorBo in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113233
* Avoid `Unsafe.As` in `BitConverter` by @xtqqczze in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112616
* Publish dotnet/runtime using standard Arcade Publish tooling by @jkoritzinsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111934
* Fixup null annotations from ClaimsPrincipal by @vcsjones in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113258
* JIT: Switch `optOptimizeLayout` to pre-layout optimization phase by @amanasifkhalid in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113224
* Remove use of --no-lock with Homebrew. by @vcsjones in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113277
* Coalesce ifdef blocks by @IDisposable in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113284
* JIT: Support bitwise field insertions for return registers by @jakobbotsch in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113178
* Update `.comment` section by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113255
* [main] Update dependencies from dotnet/source-build-reference-packages by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113310
* [RISC-V] Use zero register as argument for atomics by @tomeksowi in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112693
* [RISC-V] PerfScore by @tomeksowi in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113011
* [RISC-V] Replace load local address with load global by @tomeksowi in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113125
* JIT: Introduce `LclVarDsc::lvIsMultiRegDest` by @jakobbotsch in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113294
* Add test that AppContext.BaseDirectory is rooted by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113232
* Support disassembling single file bundle for ILSpy by @cshung in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112541
* Fix LdapConnection with AuthType.External by @ericstj in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113238
* OSDescription: Returns a user-friendly name instead of kernel info on Android & Apple platforms by @makazeu in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113041
* Add API compat instructions to libraries building README by @stephentoub in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113088
* Update README.md by @ViktorHofer in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113329
* Publish all assets and allow more stages to run in parallel by @jkoritzinsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113327
* Skip inbuild projects in stage2 (built by stage1) by @am11 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113243
* [browser] Add application environment to boot config by @maraf in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113164
* JIT: Add some more constant folding in lowering by @jakobbotsch in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113301
* Remove AreVNsEquivalent by @EgorBo in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113304
* Assertprop: Remove more useless assertions + cleanup by @EgorBo in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113298
* Make sure FEATURE_STANDALONE_GC is defined for the usual VM build by @cshung in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113347
* [android][coreclr] Fix lifetime of host_runtime_contract in template by @elinor-fung in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113341
* JIT: Avoid dual "parameter" assignments by @jakobbotsch in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113324
* [wasm] Bump chrome for testing - linux: 134.0.6998.35, windows: 134.0.6998.36 by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113297
* Reword HostAbortedException docs by @ericstj in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113336
* JIT: Run switch peeling only once by @amanasifkhalid in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113326
* JIT: Remove `fgRelocateEHRegions` by @amanasifkhalid in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113330
* Add another set of debugging prints for stack overflow issue by @janvorli in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112284
* JIT: Accelerate Vector.Dot for all base types by @saucecontrol in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111853
* Don't update side-effects in a statement that doesn't exist by @EgorBo in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113351
* [main] Update dependencies from dotnet/arcade by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113056
* Correct Invariant Globalization docs by @iCodeSometime in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113392
* [NativeAOT] Initialize COM before initializing FLS slot. by @VSadov in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113194
* Delete unused legacy hosting flags by @jkotas in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112975
* JIT: avoid fp divide by zero in profile synthesis by @AndyAyersMS in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113396
* JIT: fix arm64 issue around flags and neg with contained operand by @AndyAyersMS in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113391
* Fix blob and symbol package publishing by @jkoritzinsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113377
* Add InlineArrayX types by @333fred in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113403
* Enable `UseSizeOptimizedLinq` by default on native AOT by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113214
* Fix OperExceptions for SIMD Divide by @EgorBo in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113394
* Switch to Azure Linux queues by @richlander in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112024
* Add the `CurrentUserOnly` and `CurrentSessionOnly` options for named `Mutex`, `Semaphore`, and `EventWaitHandle` by @kouvel in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112213
* [browser] profiler setup and env variables by @pavelsavara in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113339
* Don't set PreserveRepoOrigin by @jkoritzinsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113422
* Small TP improvement in assertprop by @EgorBo in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113360
* JIT: Don't skip non-funclet try regions with handlers in `fgFindTryRegionEnds` by @amanasifkhalid in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113424
* Fix `IDE0004` for object comparison by @xtqqczze in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110206
* Allow null key parameters for public keys and certificates. by @vcsjones in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113420
* ISimdVector vector intrinsics fixes by @lewing in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113288
* Remove FileExtensionSignInfos for .deb, .rpm, & .pkg by @ellahathaway in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113451
* [mono][interp] Add SN Vector intrinsics by @lewing in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113456
* [HttpStress] [SslStress] Run stress tests nightly against staging branches by @antonfirsov in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113432
* Refactor `external_assembly_probe` to be separate from single-file bundle probing by @elinor-fung in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113356
* Include xmmintrin.h early on x86 as well by @jkoritzinsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113279
* Revert "Pin SHAs for container images" by @richlander in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113248
* Disable some named synchronization object tests on Windows Server Core by @kouvel in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113482
* Fix obsoletion message for SslStream properties by @rzikm in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113375
* Add runtime-nativeaot-outerloop to build analysis by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113520
* Added in non-generic interfaces for Tensors by @michaelgsharp in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113401
* Fix issues in GetKeyedService() and GetKeyedServices() with AnyKey by @steveharter in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113137
* Fix missing ServiceCallSite.Key causing an unkeyed cache entry to be overwritten by a keyed instance by @IliaShuliatikov in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113343
* Perform additional checks in `PEHeaders`. by @teo-tsirpanis in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113048
* [RISC-V] Fix JitDisasmDiffable by @tomeksowi in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113161
* new perf-build pipeline added by @e-kharion in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113221
* Fix double dispose of GCHandle in BrowserWebSocket by @filipnavara in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113464
* Host: fix Cancellation not aborting Start in some cases by @mus65 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113442
* Clear diagnostic headers on request reuse by @antonfirsov in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113342
* Update to Ubuntu 25.04 by @richlander in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113405
* Add trim-safe ValidationContext constructor by @captainsafia in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113426
* dotnet-runtime-perf-build pipeline triggering fix by @e-kharion in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113545
* JIT: introduce durable EH region ID by @AndyAyersMS in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113497
* JIT: Fix bad constant folding of (0 shift x) => x by @jakobbotsch in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113493
* Implement software write watch for GC heap feature for arm32. by @viewizard in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113017
* JIT: Remove `fgReorderBlocks` by @amanasifkhalid in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113335
* Tensor.Slice No Longer Copies by @michaelgsharp in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113166
* [main] Update dependencies from dotnet/xharness by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113309
* [browser] test that Task.Yield yields to browser event loop by @pavelsavara in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113531
* Don't call fgMorphBlockStmt in LoopClonning by @EgorBo in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113558
* Update llvm-libunwind to 20.1.0 by @am11 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113513
* JIT: Ensure `fgTryMorphStructArg` morphs created trees by @jakobbotsch in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113496
* JIT: fix issue in cloning loops with trys in handlers by @AndyAyersMS in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113586
* [main] Update dependencies from dotnet/source-build-reference-packages by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113593
* Fix AcquireCredentialHandle parameter lifetime by @rzikm in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113540
* [wasm] Bump chrome for testing - linux: 134.0.6998.88, windows: 134.0.6998.89 by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113577
* [android][tests] Do not package unused CoreCLR libs when building test apks by @ivanpovazan in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113209
* Use `GetUninitializedObject` to marshal LayoutClass by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113529
* performance pipelines triggers unified by @e-kharion in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113556
* Disable SendAsync_ReuseRequestInHandler_ResetsHeadersForEachReuse on WASM by @antonfirsov in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113543
* [browser] Change default boot config to dotnet.boot.js by @maraf in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113374
* [browser] [wasm] Make response streaming opt-out by @campersau in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111680
* Fix GetInterfaceMap with respect to generics by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113611
* JIT: Properly handle param reg targets with multiple register assignments by @jakobbotsch in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113499
* JIT: Remove `LclVarDsc::_lvArgReg` and `_lvOtherArgReg` by @jakobbotsch in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113501
* [WinHTTP] Let OS chose SSL/TLS protocol if not set to `WinHttpHandler` by @ManickaP in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113525
* Switch to AwesomeAssertions by @ericstj in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113425
* Allow specifying SDK search paths in global.json by @elinor-fung in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113512
* Revert "Revert "Pin SHAs for container images"" by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113598
* JIT: Remove oldlayout test configs by @amanasifkhalid in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113621
* Tensor<T> - Fixed missing memory offset from ReadOnlyTensorSpan by @michaelgsharp in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113618
* Use reflection metadata to represent methods/fields in native layout by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113413
* LoongArch is a NEW ISA which is different from MIPS by @4Darmygeometry in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113564
* [release/10.0-preview3] JIT: Don't use checked bounds in assertprop by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113656
* [release/10.0-preview3] Bump downlevels for p3 by @lewing in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113662
* [release/10.0-preview3] Update dependencies from dotnet/emsdk by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113653
* [release/10.0-preview3] Revert "Refactor `external_assembly_probe` to be separate from single-file bundle probing" by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113746

## New Contributors
* @mus65 made their first contribution in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112534
* @ashutoshjadhav9 made their first contribution in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112777
* @Venkad000 made their first contribution in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112849
* @tbdty made their first contribution in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113085
* @TickThunder made their first contribution in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113163
* @iCodeSometime made their first contribution in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113392
* @IliaShuliatikov made their first contribution in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113343
* @4Darmygeometry made their first contribution in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113564

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/compare/v10.0.0-preview.2.25163.2...v10.0.0-preview.3.25171.5

name: .NET 9.0.5
body:
[Release](https://github.com/dotnet/core/releases/tag/v9.0.5)

## What's Changed
* [release/9.0-staging] [HttpStress] [SslStress] Run stress tests nightly against staging branches by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113476
* [release/9.0] [browser][http] mute JS exceptions about network errors + HEAD verb by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113261
* [release/9.0-staging] Fix double dispose of GCHandle in BrowserWebSocket by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113541
* [release/9.0-staging] [HttpStress] Fix Linux HttpStress build by @antonfirsov in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113617
* [release/9.0-staging] Use minipal_getcpufeatures to detect for AVX (#113032) by @cshung in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113489
* [release/9.0-staging] Backport "Use FLS detach callback as a thread termination notification. Another try." by @VSadov in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113055
* [release/9.0-staging] [Json] Avoid writing to PipeWriter if IAsyncEnumerable throws before first item by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113699
* [browser] Remove experimental args from NodeJS WBT runner (part2) by @maraf in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113753
* [9.0] Update openssl dependency for openSUSE by @NikolaMilosavljevic in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113548
* [release/9.0-staging] JIT: avoid fp divide by zero in profile synthesis by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113418
* [release/9.0-staging] Do not substitute return values of constrained calls by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113462
* [release/9.0] Test failure - SendAsync_RequestVersion20_ResponseVersion20 by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113649
* [release/9.0-staging] [mono] Missing memory barrier leads to crash in multi-threaded scenarios by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113740
* [release/9.0] Move DAC signing identity to PME by @hoyosjs in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/114031
* [release/9.0-staging] Update dependencies from dotnet/icu by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113460
* [release/9.0] Update dependencies from dotnet/emsdk by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113483
* [release/9.0-staging] Update dependencies from dotnet/runtime-assets by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113516
* [release/9.0-staging] Update dependencies from dotnet/cecil by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113461
* [release/9.0-staging] Update dependencies from dotnet/arcade by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113561
* [release/9.0-staging] Update dependencies from dotnet/xharness by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113595
* [release/9.0-staging] Update dependencies from dotnet/roslyn by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113821
* [9.0] libnethost no LTCG by @jkoritzinsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113893
* [9.0] Bring back yml necessary change types in label checkers by @carlossanlop in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/114166
* [release/9.0-staging] [Apple mobile] Enable trimming on build machines to match ILLink features by @kotlarmilos in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113466
* [release/9.0-staging] Fix VS div-by-0 in DacEnumerableHashTable code by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113892
* [release/9.0-staging] Update dependencies from dotnet/hotreload-utils by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113517
* [release/9.0-staging] Update dependencies from dotnet/roslyn-analyzers by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113822
* [release/9.0-staging] Update dependencies from dotnet/sdk by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113596
* Update branding to 9.0.5 by @vseanreesermsft in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/114162
* [automated] Merge branch 'release/9.0' => 'release/9.0-staging' by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/113449
* [release/9.0] Update dependencies from dotnet/emsdk by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/114185

name: .NET 10.0 Preview 2
body:
[Release](https://github.com/dotnet/core/releases/tag/v10.0.0-preview.2)

## What's Changed
* Avoid generic virtual dispatch for frozen collections alternate lookup by @andrewjsaid in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/108732
* Bump main to preview2 by @carlossanlop in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111882
* Localized file check-in by OneLocBuild Task: Build definition ID 679: Build ID 2629821 by @dotnet-bot in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111884
* Add debugging checks for stack overflow tests failure by @janvorli in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111867
* [browser] reduce msbuild memory footprint by @pavelsavara in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111751
* new trimmer feature System.TimeZoneInfo.Invariant by @pavelsavara in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111215
* [main] Update dependencies from dotnet/roslyn by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111691
* Remove `RequiresProcessIsolation` from mcc tests by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111887
* Handle unicode in absolute URI path for combine. by @rokonec in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111710
* Cross Product for Vector2 and Vector4 by @AlexRadch in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111265
* Removing Entry2MethodDesc as it is unnecessary by @davidwrighton in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111756
* Sign the DAC and DBI during the build process instead of in separate steps by @jkoritzinsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111416
* [SRM] Refactor reading from streams. by @teo-tsirpanis in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111323
* Add FrozenDictionary specialization for integers / enums by @stephentoub in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111886
* Fix linux-x86 build by @filipnavara in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111861
* Fix shimmed implementation of TryGetHashAndReset to handle HMAC. by @vcsjones in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111929
* Remove unsafe `bool` casts by @xtqqczze in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111024
* JIT: Enable inlining for late devirtualization by @hez2010 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110827
* Make cdac APIs public but experimental by @jkoritzinsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111180
* Implement 'ConditionalWeakTable<TKey,TValue>.GetOrAdd' APIs by @Sergio0694 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111204
* System.Text.Json: Fix polymorphic state bug when using ReferenceHandler.IgnoreCycles by @yesmey in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111808
* arm64: Add tests for add(s), and(s), sub(s), cmp, cmn, eor, neg & orr by @jonathandavies-arm in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111796
* arm64: Add support for bitwise NOT by @jonathandavies-arm in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111904
* JIT: Remove OSR quirk in `fgOptimizeUncondBranchToSimpleCond` by @amanasifkhalid in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111936
* JIT: Skip `fgComputeMissingBlockWeights` when we have profile data by @amanasifkhalid in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111873
* [android] Internal Android sample build improvements and CoreCLR support by @ivanpovazan in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111545
* Add workflow to prevent merging a PR when the `NO-MERGE` label is applied by @carlossanlop in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111940
* Change NativeAOT asset input resolution to explicitly replace only assemblies that come from the non-NativeAOT runtime package by @jkoritzinsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111944
* Invoke crossgen exe when building R2RTest by @steveisok in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111881
* Fix mistakes in net9 WorkloadManifest.json by @akoeplinger in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111950
* Cleanup membarrier portability by @jkotas in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111943
* Avoid `Unsafe.As` for `Memory<T>` and `ReadOnlyMemory<T>` conversion by @xtqqczze in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111023
* Remove zlib dependencies from Docker containers by @carlossanlop in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111939
* Use IRootFunctions in Tensor.StdDev by @lilinus in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110641
* JIT: fix try region cloning when try is nested in a handler by @AndyAyersMS in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111975
* Add remark to `ConditionalSelect` by @hamarb123 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111945
* Fix failed assertion 'FPbased == FPbased2' by @filipnavara in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111787
* Replace OPTIMIZE_FOR_SIZE with feature switch by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111743
* Combined dependency update by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111852
* Fix ICustomQueryInterface implementation in CrossApartmentQueryInterface_NoDeadlock by @jkoritzinsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111978
* [main] Update dependencies from dotnet/arcade by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111996
* [main] Update dependencies from dotnet/roslyn by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111946
* [mono][mini] Disable inlining if we encounter class initialization failure by @BrzVlad in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111754
* System.Speech: Use intellisense xml from dotnet-api-docs by @carlossanlop in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111983
* [iOS][globalization] Fix IndexOf on empty strings on iOS to return -1 by @matouskozak in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111898
* [JIT] Add legacy extended EVEX encoding and EVEX.ND/NF feature to x64 emitter backend by @Ruihan-Yin in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/108796
* JIT: Check for profile consistency throughout JIT backend by @amanasifkhalid in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111684
* JIT: Run 3-opt once across all regions by @amanasifkhalid in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111989
* Fix BigInteger outerloop test by @Rob-Hague in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111841
* Native AOT Pri-1 test tree bring up (Loader test tree) by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111994
* Baseline more pri1 tests with native AOT by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111068
* JIT: Fold more nullchecks by @EgorBo in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111985
* Move the diagnostic print for stack overflow test failure by @janvorli in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112001
* Propose new async API by @agocke in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110420
* JIT: fix case where implied subrange assertions can get lost in morph by @AndyAyersMS in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112020
* Fix explicit offset of ByRefLike fields. by @AaronRobinsonMSFT in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111584
* JIT: Try to retain entry weight during profile synthesis by @amanasifkhalid in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111971
* JIT: Simplify x86 special intrinsic imports by @saucecontrol in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111836
* JIT: Improve x86 unsigned to floating cast codegen by @saucecontrol in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111595
* Disable LTCG for brotli and zlibng. by @jkoritzinsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111805
* WasmAppBuilder: Remove double computation of a value by @filipnavara in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112047
* Fix case-insensitive JSON deserialization of enum member names by @PranavSenthilnathan in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112028
* Remove unused build controls and simplify DotNetBuild.props by @jkoritzinsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111986
* JIT: Update type when return temp is freshly created by @hez2010 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111948
* Simplify boolean logic in `TimeZoneInfo` by @xtqqczze in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112062
* JIT: Compute `fgCalledCount` after synthesis by @amanasifkhalid in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112041
* Use double.ConvertToIntegerNative where safe to do in System.Random by @tannergooding in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112046
* Ensure that math calls into the CRT are tracked as needing vzeroupper by @tannergooding in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112011
* JIT: Transform single-reg args to FIELD_LIST in physical promotion by @jakobbotsch in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111590
* [main] Update dependencies from dotnet/arcade by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112013
* Use Contains{Any} in Regex source generator by @MihaZupan in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112065
* Always inline number conversions by @hez2010 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112061
* Build the RID-specific System.IO.Ports packages in the VMR by @jkoritzinsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112054
* Keep test PDB in helix payload for native AOT by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111949
* System.Net.Http.WinHttpHandler.StartRequestAsync assertion failed by @pedrobsaila in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/109799
* [wasm] Bump chrome for testing - linux: 132.0.6834.159, windows: 133.0.6943.35 by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112066
* Fail tests if LTCG is used by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111651
* Fix string trimming in AppleSdk.cs by @akoeplinger in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112090
* [main] Update dependencies from dotnet/roslyn-analyzers by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111518
* [main] Update dependencies from dotnet/roslyn by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112030
* [main] Update dependencies from dnceng/internal/dotnet-optimization by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111848
* [main] Update dependencies from dotnet/arcade by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112084
* [main] Update dependencies from dotnet/cecil, dotnet/hotreload-utils, dotnet/source-build-externals by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112085
* [main] Update dependencies from dotnet/source-build-reference-packages by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111329
* [main] Update dependencies from dotnet/xharness by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111604
* Remove one usage of `Unsafe.AsPointer`. by @teo-tsirpanis in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112079
* [mono][mini] Remove support for the Xamarin.iOS and Xamarin.Mac assemblies in the AOT compiler. by @rolfbjarne in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/108886
* Some System.Decimal performance improvements by @Daniel-Svensson in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/99212
* Tests ran counter by @VincentBu in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111145
* Let the debugger knows DATAS is on by @cshung in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107115
* Enable Mono tests by @steveharter in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111981
* [main] Update dependencies from dotnet/emsdk by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111690
* Include PDB for all TfmRuntimeSpecificPackageFile by @ericstj in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111879
* use collection syntax in illink by @kasperk81 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/108458
* [daccess] Do not use USE_DAC_TABLE_RVA on Apple platforms by @filipnavara in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112076
* Update breaking change rules regarding byref/objref fields. by @AaronRobinsonMSFT in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112087
* Use hardlinks in helixpublishwitharcade by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112091

* Fold null checks against known non-null values by @MichalPetryka in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/109164

* More clean up to debugger attribute tests by @mrvoorhe in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112450
* Revert "[browser][MT] move wasm MT CI legs to extra-platforms" by @lewing in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112712
* Fix `PipeWriter.AsStream(bool)` xmldoc by @austindrenski in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/112669

name: .NET 10.0 Preview 1
body:
[Release](https://github.com/dotnet/core/releases/tag/v10.0.0-preview.1)

## What's Changed
* Add support for AES-GCM and ChaCha20Poly1305 on iOS/tvOS/MacCatalyst via CryptoKit by @akoeplinger in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/104383
* [mono] Exit early to prevent endless loop when crashing by @akoeplinger in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/105249
* Caching: migrate HybridCache api surface from asp.net into runtime by @mgravell in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/103103
* Fix Deadlock Inside Metrics Code by @tarekgh in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/105259
* [browser][MT] longer timeout for VFS heavy tests by @pavelsavara in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/105258
* `Guid(Int32, Int16, Int16, Byte[])` changes by @xtqqczze in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/105208
* Revert "Migrate to zlib-ng, part 3: Remove zlib and zlib-intel source code and license mentions" by @carlossanlop in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/105284
* Bump LLVM to 19.x branch by @radekdoulik in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/103585
* Update assert and enable tests for CoreCLR by @AaronRobinsonMSFT in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/105266
* Improve the handling of SVE state as part of threadsuspend by @tannergooding in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/105059
* Enable generic function pointer tests on mono by @hez2010 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/103534
* Take process lock earlier by @AaronRobinsonMSFT in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/105280
* [mono][aot] Emit marhsalling exception when dealing with MONO_MARSHAL_CONV_OBJECT_IUNKNOWN by @steveisok in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/105156
* [main] Update dependencies from 8 repositories by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/104856
* [browser] Use StaticWebAssets fingerprinting in Wasm SDK by @maraf in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/103755
* Remove unused members on runtime Thread by @elinor-fung in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/105158
* [browser] Turn `BlazorCacheBootResources` off by default when targeting .NET 9 by @maraf in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/105235
* [browser] Extension agnostic lazy assembly loading by @maraf in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/104793
* Build .NETCoreApp source gens in allconfigurations build by @ViktorHofer in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/105247
* Fix intellisense package xml file failing up-to-date check in libs projects by @ViktorHofer in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/105243
* Make System.IO.Packaging test trim safe by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/105160
* Fix source-build leg by @ViktorHofer in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/105306
* JIT: Change VN's representation for phi definitions by @jakobbotsch in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/105198
* [test][Eventpipe] Disable eventsourceerror on OSX by @mdh1418 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/105278
* Delete dead code in System.Diagnostics.Tracing tests by @stephentoub in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/105237
* Remove unnecessary ref source projects from Microsoft.Bcl packages by @ViktorHofer in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/105312
* MemoryTests.AllocateLargeHeapThenRepeatedlyInterop timing out - disable by @ilonatommy in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/105302
* [main] Update dependencies from dotnet/arcade by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/105301
* [WASI] SDK provisioning by @pavelsavara in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/105321
* Fix System.Globalization.Extensions.Tests for icu 74/unicode 15.1 by @omajid in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/105282
* Revert "[browser] Turn `BlazorCacheBootResources` off by default when targeting .NET 9" by @maraf in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/105323
* Disable verify_committed_bytes for segments by @cshung in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/105102

* Track that kmov instructions may write to GPR register by @kunalspathak in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107428
* Run native aot runtime tests on cet compatible machines by @eduardo-vp in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/105288
* unnecessary assert when GetHeap is called in wait_for_gc_done by @Maoni0 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107073
* check in configurations by @WangyangZhou90 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107012
* Disable ilasm tests for nativeaot test runs by @jkoritzinsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107432
* codeql fixes by @mangod9 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107422
* Enable more BinaryFormatter tests by @adamsitnik in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107408
* Add NrbfDecoderFuzzer by @buyaa-n in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107385
* Make ComponentActivator.[LoadAssemblyAnd]GetFunctionPointer set initialize out pointer to 0 by @elinor-fung in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107426
* Make Module::LoadAssembly return Assembly instead of DomainAssembly by @elinor-fung in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107411
* JIT: Simplify block insertion logic during loop compaction by @amanasifkhalid in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107403
* Fix EVP_MAC_CTX cleanup in one shot by @vcsjones in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107431
* Remove thread contention from Activity Start/Stop by @AlgorithmsAreCool in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107333
* Move pinned heap handle table from `BaseDomain` to `AppDomain` and make callers go through the `AppDomain` by @elinor-fung in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107420
* [mono] Fix swizzle_mask type by @radekdoulik in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107460
* [NRBF] Fix bugs discovered by the fuzzer by @adamsitnik in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107368
* Do not over-align code when JitAlignLoops=0 is set by @filipnavara in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107340
* Fix SegmentResortChains synchronization by @ChrisAhna in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107468
* JIT ARM64: Don't emit `mov` for zero case in jump tables for shift intrinsics by @amanasifkhalid in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107322
* Remove Helper Method Frames for Exception, GC and Thread methods by @AaronRobinsonMSFT in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107218
* [wasm] Implement MONO_MEMORY_BARRIER in jiterpreter by @kg in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107325
* [wasm] Implement MINT_SWITCH opcode in jiterpreter by @kg in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107423
* JIT: don't create vector constants from relocatable constants by @AndyAyersMS in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107491
* JIT: Simplify block insertion logic during loop canonicalization by @amanasifkhalid in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107371
* Convert `WaitHandle` FCalls to QCalls by @AaronRobinsonMSFT in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107488
* Fix corner-case accounting bug in new codeheap allocation by @jkotas in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107492
* Implement getClassAssemblyName by @hez2010 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/106959
* Remove unused declarations from clsload.hpp by @preeyan in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107509
* [browser][MT] fix feature detection on webworker by @pavelsavara in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107452
* [mono][infra] Decrease used CPUs for x64 fullAOT CI builds by @matouskozak in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107531
* [wasm] Implement MINT_NEWARR in jiterpreter by @kg in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107430
* [ILStrip] Fix passing assemblies using relative path by @jkurdek in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107536
* [main] Update dependencies from dotnet/xharness by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107291
* Remove `BaseDomain` use in `LoaderAllocator` and event tracing helpers by @elinor-fung in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107481
* Fix module being set as tenured too early by @elinor-fung in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107489
* Remove ActiveIssue for resolved issues in Vector tests by @lilinus in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107127
* Fix thread static cleanup paths by @davidwrighton in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107438
* Convert some handle APIs from FCalls to fast FCall and slow QCall by @AaronRobinsonMSFT in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107513
* Disable TensorExtensionsTwoSpanInFloatOut due to https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/issues/107254 by @tannergooding in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107555
* Avoid using OpenThread for out of process SetThreadContext debugging by @tommcdon in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107511
* Fix reflection-calling `Set` method on arrays by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107529
* Convert Thread FCalls to QCalls by @AaronRobinsonMSFT in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107495
* Arm: Consider the fact that targetReg can be second half during resolution by @kunalspathak in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107493
* ARM64-SVE: Allow op inside conditionalselect to be non HWintrinsic by @a74nh in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107180
* Make missing framework error message list other architectures that were found by @elinor-fung in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107156
* Arm: Fix the base register used for restoring register from stack by @kunalspathak in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107564
* Extend the list of recognized `SearchValues<char>` field names in Regex by @MihaZupan in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107402
* Use SearchValues in Uri.CheckForUnicodeOrEscapedUnreserved by @stephentoub in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107357
* Make DAC and ProfToEEInterfaceImpl stop using BaseDomain by @elinor-fung in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107570
* [WASI] improve single-threaded threadpool by @pavelsavara in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107395
* [wasm] Clean up some FIXMEs in the jiterpreter by @kg in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107562
* Add [DebuggerDisplay] to CancellationTokenSource by @martincostello in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/105764
* JIT: Add simple late layout pass by @amanasifkhalid in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107483
* Remove FCThrowRes from AssemblyNative::IsDynamic by @elinor-fung in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107574
* [wasm] more cases when looking up unmanaged delegates by @lewing in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107113
* Localized file check-in by OneLocBuild Task: Build definition ID 679: Build ID 2534549 by @dotnet-bot in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/105829
* Consider existence of EETypes and metadata for typeof checks by @MichalStrehovsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107347
* [NRBF] throw SerializationException when a surrogate character is read  by @adamsitnik in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107532
* Disable binary formatter tests when DotNetBuildSourceOnly. by @tmds in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107549
* Fix heap corruption issue in PriorityQueue.Remove by @eiriktsarpalis in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107550
* Fix JsonSchemaExporter support for global UnmappedMemberHandling settings. by @eiriktsarpalis in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107545
* [iOS] [HybridGlobalization] Throw PNSE when methods with matchLength are used by @mkhamoyan in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107390
* Add a SearchValues implementation for values with unique low nibbles by @MihaZupan in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/106900
* Fix ISA check in Runtime_107146 test by @EgorBo in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107539
* Make Half max precision test culture-invariant by @lilinus in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/105685
* Improve error message when running `dotnet app.exe` by @elinor-fung in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107484
* [wasm] Include .NET version in templates package id by @maraf in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107182
* [mono] Disable UnitTest_GVM_TypeLoadException for fullAOT jobs by @matouskozak in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107502
* All mobile platforms go down the RunTests.sh path, not just browser. by @jkoritzinsky in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107563
* [mono] Fix crash in emit_llvmonly_handler_start by @radekdoulik in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107461
* Add missing `[RequiresDynamicCode]` attributes to System.Linq.Expressions API in ref assembly by @cston in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107580
* JIT: disable scev analysis for non-integral types by @AndyAyersMS in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107618
* [mono] Update more C code gen by @lewing in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107593
* Fix SuperPMI collections by @BruceForstall in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107588
* JIT: Fix placement of loop exit blocks in handler regions by @amanasifkhalid in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107582
* Always pass LoaderAllocator when creating Assembly by @elinor-fung in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107643
* [NRBF] Fuzzing non-seekable stream input by @adamsitnik in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107605
* Remove helper method frame from Profiler hooks by @davidwrighton in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107152
* Remove vestigial ReadOnlySequence.SequenceType.Empty by @halter73 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107630
* Fix config source gen binding value types to null configuration values by @tarekgh in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107654
* [LoongArch64] Fix the clr build error on Alpine. by @LuckyXu-HF in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107669
* Add the _requiresAlign8 bool to the compare and mangled name for GCStaticEETypeNode.cs by @yowl in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107650
* [mono] Revert "don't define HAS_CUSTOM_BLOCKS on mono (#106764)" by @matouskozak in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107558
* Fix SSP issue with HW exceptions from JIT helpers by @janvorli in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107665
* [wasm] Increase jiterpreter limits by @kg in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107557
* Fix HashSet copy constructor handling of instances that have fallen back to the randomized hashcode generator. by @eiriktsarpalis in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107613
* [main] Update dependencies from 7 repositories by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/106873
* [mono] Fix alloca builder creation by @radekdoulik in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107464
* Make hostfxr_get_runtime_property_value initialize out pointer to null by @elinor-fung in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107645
* Consolidate log for reliability framework by @VincentBu in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107517
* Disable ICU package for Apple mobile builds by @akoeplinger in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107855
* Fix typo in comment of SAVE_ARGUMENT_REGISTERS by @gbalykov in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/106011
* Ensure we create new RemoteInvokeOptions for every call by @ericstj in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107820
* Remove redundant unsafe from SVE APIs by @SwapnilGaikwad in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107854
* Mark Encoding as nullable in StreamWriter's constructor by @stefannikolei in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/106658
* Overhaul Main Workflow Docs by @ivdiazsa in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107415
* Fix the operands of NI_AVX512F_TernaryLogic during lowering by @kunalspathak in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107813
* Empty slice fix by @michaelgsharp in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107316
* Fixing 0 length issue with constructor by @michaelgsharp in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107427
* [RISC-V] Update ABI doc by @tomeksowi in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107286
* [PERF] Move performance testing logic into python scripts by @caaavik-msft in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/101143
* instrumentation (mostly) for DATAS by @Maoni0 in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/107853
* Add missing documentation for new 9.0 APIs in System.IO by @jozkee in https://github.com/dotnet

name: .NET 9.0.2
body:
[Release](https://github.com/dotnet/core/releases/tag/v9.0.2)

## What's Changed
* [release/9.0-staging] Ensure Vector.Create is properly recognized as intrinsic by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/109322
* [release/9.0-staging] Fix return address hijacking with CET by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/109548
* [release/9.0] Fix FP state restore on macOS exception forwarding by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110163
* [release/9.0-staging] [debugger] Fix a step that becomes a go by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110533
* [release/9.0-staging] [debugger] Support step into a tail call by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110438
* [release/9.0-staging] Fix Tizen linux-armel build by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110614
* release/9.0-staging -- Update Alpine, Debian, and Fedora versions  by @richlander in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110493
* [release/9.0-staging] JIT: Read back all replacements before statements with implicit EH control flow by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/109143
* [release/9.0-staging] Fix crash when pTargetMD is null by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110652
* [release/9.0-staging] Avoid exception when parsing AD path for port number by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110224
* [release/9.0-staging] Fix System.Reflection.Emit `SetChecksum` creating invalid pdb by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110205
* [release/9.0] Use floating tag for webassembly image by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/109374
* [release/9.0-staging] [Profiler] Avoid Recursive ThreadStoreLock in Profiling Thread Enumerator by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110665
* [release/9.0-staging] JIT: Include more edges in `BlockDominancePreds` to avoid a JIT crash by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110568
* [release/9.0-staging][wasm] Workaround incorrect mono restore when building WBT by @lewing in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110590
* [release/9.0-staging] Update dependencies from dotnet/sdk by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110532
* [release/9.0-staging] Update dependencies from dotnet/cecil by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110572
* [release/9.0-staging] Conditionally check the compiler flags in libs.native by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/109556
* [TestOnly][release/9.0-staging] Fix TimeProvider Test by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111132
* [release/9.0-staging] [mono] Chain `SIGSEGV` native crashes to the default `SIGSEGV` handler by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110863
* [release/9.0-staging] Update dependencies from dotnet/source-build-reference-packages by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110905
* [release/9.0-staging] Exit the lock before we call into user code and handle losing the race for the RCW table by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111162
* [release/9.0-staging] Fix race condition when cancelling pending HTTP connection attempts by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110764
* [release/9.0-staging] Remove HttpMetricsEnrichmentContext caching by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110626
* [release/9.0-staging] Fix IDynamicInterfaceCastable with shared generic code by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/109918
* [release/9.0-staging] Fix handling of IDynamicInterfaceCastable wrt CastCache by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110007
* [release/9.0-staging] ILC: Allow OOB reference to upgrade framework assembly by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110058
* [release/9.0-staging] Move ComWrappers AddRef to C/C++ by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110815
* [release/9.0-staging] [BrowserDebugProxy] Remove exception details from error report by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111202
* [release/9.0-staging] Fix reporting GC fields from base types by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111040
* [release/9.0-staging] Fix C++/CLI applications which use __declspec(appdomain) by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110495
* [release/9.0-staging] Fix calling convention mismatch in GC callouts by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111105
* [release/9.0-staging] Don't wait for finalizers in 'IReferenceTrackerHost::ReleaseDisconnectedReferenceSources' by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110558
* [release/9.0-staging] Add forwarding support for WasmLinkage on LibraryImport by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/109364
* [release/9.0-staging] Fix obtaining type handles of IDynamicInterfaceCastableImplementation by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/109909
* [release/9.0-staging] Disable GS cookie checks for LightUnwind by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/109530
* [release/9.0-staging] Fix analyzer tracking of nullable enums by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110331
* Update branding to 9.0.2 by @vseanreesermsft in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111172
* [release/9.0-staging] Bugfix InvalidOperationException/IndexOutOfRangeException in HttpListener.EndGetContext  by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110695
* [release/9.0-staging] Fix `IsOSVersionAtLeast` when build or revision are not provided by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/109332
* [release/9.0-staging] [mono][sgen] Add separate card mark function to be used with debug by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110268
* [release/9.0-staging] [mono][aot] Fix compilation crashes when type load exception is generated in code by @BrzVlad in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110271
* [release/9.0-staging] Change assembler to clang in android MonoAOT by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110812
* [release/9.0-staging] Replace a few SuppressMessage annotations with UnconditionalSuppressMessage by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/109186
* [release/9.0-staging] Update dependencies from dotnet/xharness by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111331
* [release/9.0-staging] Update dependencies from dotnet/roslyn by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110992
* [release/9.0-staging] Update dependencies from dotnet/roslyn-analyzers by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110993
* [release/9.0-staging] Update dependencies from dotnet/source-build-reference-packages by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111325
* [release/9.0-staging] Update dependencies from dotnet/icu by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110935
* [release/9.0-staging] Update dependencies from dotnet/emsdk by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110970
* [release/9.0-staging] Update dependencies from dotnet/cecil by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110937
* [release/9.0-staging] Update dependencies from dotnet/arcade by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111017
* [release/9.0-staging] Update dependencies from dotnet/hotreload-utils by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110936
* [release/9.0-staging] Re-try loading ENGINE keys with a non-NULL UI_METHOD by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/109783
* [release/9.0-staging] Fix erroneous success in AsnDecoder.ReadSequence by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/109595
* [9.0] Guard against empty Accept address by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111366
* [release/9.0-staging] fix TCP FastOpen compilation by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111142
* [release/9.0-staging] [apple-mobile] Disable TLSWitLoadedDlls for Apple mobile due to missing native libs by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111356
* [release/9.0] Fix Encoding regression by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111367
* [manual] Merge release/9.0-staging into release/9.0 by @carlossanlop in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111378
* [manual] Merge release/9.0-staging into release/9.0 (second pass) by @carlossanlop in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111422
* [release/9.0] Change were libClang.so is found when generating Android aot offsets by @steveisok in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111426
* [release/9.0] Support generic fields in PersistedAssemblyBuilder by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111467
* Merging internal commits for release/9.0 by @vseanreesermsft in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111428


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/compare/v9.0.1...v9.0.2

name: .NET 8.0.13
body:
[Release](https://github.com/dotnet/core/releases/tag/v8.0.13

## What's Changed
* Add support for building with Clang 19 by @MichaelSimons in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/109198
* [Release/8.0] Fix FP state restore on macOS exception forwarding by @janvorli in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/109579
* [release/8.0-staging] [browser] Bump serialize-javascript by @maraf in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/108883
* [release/8.0-staging] [debugger] Support step into a tail call by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110440
* release/8.0-staging -- Update Alpine and Fedora versions by @richlander in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110492
* [Test Only] Port the Idna test fixes to support Unicode 15 by @tarekgh in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110705
* [release/8.0-staging] Fix crash when pTargetMD is null by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110651
* [release/8.0] Remove DiagnosticSource reference from Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions by @ericstj in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110458
* [release/8.0-staging] Fix Tizen linux-armel build by @akoeplinger in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110792
* [release/8.0-staging] [mono] Chain `SIGSEGV` native crashes to the default `SIGSEGV` handler by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110866
* [release/8.0-staging] Fix race condition when cancelling pending HTTP connection attempts by @MihaZupan in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110765
* [release/8.0-staging] Remove HttpMetricsEnrichmentContext caching by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110628
* [release/8.0-staging] ILC: Allow OOB reference to upgrade framework assembly by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110059
* [release/8.0] Fix nativeaot outerloop by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/109010
* [release/8.0-staging] [mono][sgen] Add separate card mark function to be used with debug by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110269
* Update branding to 8.0.13 by @vseanreesermsft in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111171
* [8.0] Guard against empty Accept address by @wfurt in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/108334
* [release/8.0-staging] Update dependencies from dotnet/hotreload-utils by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111159
* [release/8.0-staging] Update dependencies from dotnet/source-build-externals by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111297
* [release/8.0-staging] Update dependencies from dotnet/source-build-reference-packages by @dotnet-maestro in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/111330
* [automated] Merge branch 'release/8.0' => 'release/8.0-staging' by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/110336
* [release/8.0-staging] Fix erroneous success in AsnDecoder.ReadSequence by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/109596
* [release/8.0-staging] Re-try loading ENGINE keys with a non-NULL UI_METHOD by @github-actions in https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/109782
